title: Teknisk IT-support till Cancerfonden
description:
Är du tekniskt kunnig, serviceinriktad och vill ta ett helhetsansvar för en modern IT-miljö? Vi söker nu en teknisk IT-support som vill vara med och skapa struktur, driva förbättringar och säkerställa en stabil och säker IT-miljö hos Sveriges främsta ideella organisation.

**Om rollen**


Det här är en bred och ansvarstagande roll där du ansvarar för hela IT-miljön – från daglig support till långsiktig struktur och säkerhet.


Du kommer att spela en nyckelroll i att skapa en säker och effektiv IT-miljö som gör att alla medarbetare kan vara produktiva från dag ett.  

  

**Dina ansvarsområden**

**Support och drift**

* Vara primär IT-support för hela organisationen
* Felsöka och lösa problem snabbt
* Säkerställa en stabil och säker IT-miljö

 **Struktur och skalbarhet**

* Skapa dokumentation, guider och rutiner
* Säkerställa att vår Microsoft 365-miljö (inkl. SharePoint och Teams) är välorganiserad
* Ansvara för identiteter och accesshantering samt behörigheter för licenser och applikationer inkl kontinuerlig monitorering samt on- och offboarding
* Sätta upp processerna mellan Cancerfonden och extern leverantör

 **Onboarding och utrustning**

* Ansvara för inköp och konfiguration av hårdvara, telefoner och annan utrustning
* Sätta upp Microsoft 365 och övriga system för nya medarbetare
* Säkerställa rätt behörigheter och struktur
* Genomföra teknisk on-boarding

 **Förbättring och utveckling**

* Identifiera ineffektivitet och föreslå förbättringar
* Driva initiativ som gör arbetet enklare och mer effektiv

 **För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har god erfarenhet av:**

* Erfarenhet av IT-support och/eller IT-drift
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams m.m.)
* God vana av både PC och Mac i företagsmiljö
* Erfarenhet av verktygen, Microsoft Defender, Intune etc.
* God grundläggande nivå av IT-säkerhet
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och strukturerat
* Förklara tekniska lösningar på ett enkelt och pedagogiskt sätt
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, både muntligt och skriftligt
* Möjlighet att arbeta från kontoret i Stockholm alla dagar i veckan


Rollen kommer rapportera till Chef Tech, data och affärsutveckling.


Cancerfonden är en modern, snabbrörlig organisation med ett agilt arbetssätt och korta beslutsvägar. Vi är engagerade, nytänkande och tar tillsammans ansvar för att snabbare nå vår vision - att besegra cancer.

**Rekryteringsprocessen**  

Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning (100 %) med placering på Cancerfondens huvudkontor i Stockholm. Tillträde så snart som möjligt. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Vid frågor kontakta rekryterande chef: Emma Lundahl, emma.lundahl@cancerfonden.se.

title: Software Engineer | Data Solutions
description:
**About Brite**
---------------


Founded in 2019, Brite Payments is a Swedish fintech and a leader in Instant Account-to-Account (A2A) payments. With connections to over 3,800+ banks, Brite enables consumers to pay directly from their bank account (also known as Pay by Bank) in real-time.


With no signup or card details required, users authenticate using their bank’s usual ID method, which is not only convenient and secure but provides merchants with fast fund settlement, zero chargebacks, and reduced costs.


Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, Brite operates across 27 European markets, utilising local payment rails, open banking, and our own proprietary infrastructure, Brite Instant Payments Network (IPN).


Want to join us on our journey? The future is Brite!  

  

**The mission**

**Join the Data Solutions team at Brite! We aren't just maintaining pipelines; we are architecting the future of our data ecosystem. Having launched just a year ago, we occupy the perfect sweet spot: we’ve moved past the initial "blank page" phase, yet we are entirely free from legacy debt. If you have a passion for building high-impact data products from the ground up using a modern, serverless stack on GCP, this is your stage.**

### **What we’re looking for**

**We need a builder who thrives in an iterative environment. You won't just be executing tickets; you’ll be shaping our technical DNA. We value:**

* **True Ownership: You don’t just write code; you and the team own the solution from ideation to deployment.**
* **Analytical Rigor: You enjoy deconstructing complex data problems to find elegant, scalable solutions.**
* **The Power of "We": You believe that while individual talent is great, the best architecture is born from collaboration and collective brainpower.**

### **Requirements**

* **Experience: 5+ years of Software Engineering experience, specifically building and deploying cloud-native services.**
* **The Stack: Deep proficiency in Python and a "modern-first" approach to development.**
* **Autonomy: A proactive mindset and the ability to navigate a high degree of freedom with responsibility.**
* **Presence: A desire to collaborate in person with our team at our Stockholm office. We are working on-site at least 3 days per week.**

### **Meritorious**

* **Experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and its ecosystem.**
* **A background in serverless architectures and building for the cloud.**

### **Why join Brite?**

**If you’re looking for a role where your work has a direct line of sight to the company’s success, you’ve found it. We offer an environment defined by innovation, zero "red tape" legacy, and a culture of mutual respect.**

**Join us and build the next generation of data solutions at Brite.**

title: DevSecOps-ingenjör
description:
**Vill du vara med och bidra till ett säkrare samhälle?**


Vi utvecklar marknadens säkraste it-plattform/ PaaS, Craton för organisationer med de högsta skyddskraven. Vi hjälper samhällsviktiga aktörer att skydda sina mest värdefulla tillgångar mot både yttre och inre hot. Genom våra lösningar bidrar vi till att hålla i gång de verksamheter som får samhället att fungera även vid stora störningar eller kriser. Idag är vi ett av landets ledande företag inom verksamhets- och säkerhetsskydd och vi växer.


Om du vill vara med på en spännande utvecklingsresa i rollen som DevSecOps-ingenjör där ditt arbete gör skillnad, då är Basalt platsen för dig. Hos oss får du bygga en stark kompetens inom system som ska leva upp till de högsta säkerhetskraven, ett område med växande betydelse för hela samhället.

**Om rollen**  

I rollen som DevSecOps-ingenjör på Basalt AB kommer du arbeta med vår plattform Craton, du kan läsa mer om Craton här.


Du kommer jobba med att designa, implementera och förvalta säkra utvecklings- och driftsmiljöer baserade på on-prem-infrastruktur. Du fungerar som en teknisk nyckelresurs som driver integrationen av säkerhet i hela mjukvarulivscykeln och bidrar aktivt till omvärldsbevakning samt kunskapsspridning internt och mot kund.

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**

* Design och implementation av säkra CI/CD-pipelines med automatiserade säkerhetskontroller (SAST, DAST, SCA, secrets scanning).
* Arkitektur och förvaltning av on-prem-infrastruktur med OpenStack och Kubernetes, med säkerhet och skalbarhet i fokus.
* Leda och genomföra hotmodellering, riskanalyser och säkerhetsgranskningar av infrastruktur och applikationer.
* Implementera och förvalta infrastruktur som kod (IaC) med verktyg som Terraform, Pulumi eller Ansible.
* Ansvara för och driva omvärldsbevakning – följa hotlandskapet, analysera nya sårbarheter och trender samt producera rapporter och underlag för interna och externa intressenter.
* Stödja och vägleda kollegor samt bidra till kompetensutveckling inom teamet.
* Driva arbetet med Zero Trust-principer, härdning av miljöer och efterlevnad av relevanta ramverk (t.ex. ISO 27001, NIST, CIS Benchmarks).
* Driva en säker användning av AI i utvecklingsarbetet.

**Du ansvarar för att:**

* Äga och vidareutveckla teamets tekniska processer och verktygskedja inom DevSecOps.
* Säkerställa att säkerhetskrav integreras tidigt i utvecklingsprocessen (shift-left).
* Identifiera, prioritera och driva åtgärdsarbete kring sårbarheter och säkerhetsbrister.
* Sammanställa och kvalitetssäkra omvärldsbevakning till interna rapporter och kundleveranser.
* Dokumentera arkitekturbeslut, säkerhetskrav och driftsprocedurer.

**Din bakgrund**


För rollen efterfrågas följande kompetens:

* Relevant akademisk bakgrund inom datateknik, informationssäkerhet eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av DevOps, DevSecOps eller liknande tekniska roller.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga och driftsätta CI/CD-pipelines i verkliga miljöer (t.ex. GitHub Actions, GitLab CI eller Azure DevOps).
* Kunskap inom containerteknologier och orkestrering, i synnerhet Kubernetes i on-prem-miljö, samt tillhörande säkerhetsaspekter.
* Erfarenhet av OpenStack eller liknande plattformar för on-prem-virtualisering.
* Erfarenhet av omvärldsbevakning och förmåga att analysera och kommunicera hotinformation.
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsverktyg såsom Trivy, Snyk, SonarQube, Falco eller liknande.

**Meriterande**

* Certifieringar inom området, t.ex. CKS, CISSP eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med drift är meriterande.

**Din ansökan**  

Ansök med ditt CV och beskriv kort vad du söker i din nästa roll. Vi gör löpande urval och intervjuer så ansök gärna redan idag! Har du frågor är du varmt välkommen att höra av dig till hanna.stockelid@basalt.se  

  

**Placering och säkerhet**  

Vi har kontor i centrala Stockholm och i Enköping och du utgår från det kontor som passar dig bäst.


Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetande. Eftersom våra kunders verksamhet kräver det och flera av våra anställda är placerade i säkerhetsklass, är svenskt medborgarskap ett villkor för att arbeta på Basalt.

**Vad vi erbjuder**  

För att ge dig trygghet och stabilitet erbjuder vi ett förmånspaket som inkluderar en av marknadens bästa pensionslösningar, omfattande försäkringar, förstärkt föräldralön och ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr/år. Du får även tillgång till Benifex, där du kan hitta extra förmåner och vi erbjuder kontinuerliga möjligheter till kompetensutveckling. Vi erbjuder också tjänstledighet med löneutfyllnad för medarbetare som tjänstgör inom Försvarsmakten, inklusive GSS/T, reservofficerare och hemvärnssoldater.  

  

Vi värnar om balansen mellan arbete och fritid. Med flexibla arbetstider, 5-timmars arbetsdag innan helgdagar och ledigt på klämdagar ser vi till att du har tid för både ditt jobb och ditt privatliv. Dessutom anordnar vi gemensamma aktiviteter, såsom skidresor, träningspass samt sociala luncher och frukostar, för att stärka sammanhållningen och göra arbetsplatsen ännu trevligare.  

  

Vi strävar efter att du ska känna stolthet och trivsel hos oss på Basalt. Du kan läsa mer om våra förmåner och om hur det är att arbeta på Basalt här!

**Basalt i korthet:**

* Grundat 2009, idag ca 150 medarbetare
* Kontor i Stockholm och Enköping
* En del av Omegapoint Group
* Ledande inom säkra it-lösningar och systematiskt säkerhetsarbete
* Värderingar: vass och snäll
* Vision: att vara det självklara valet för ett robust och säkert samhälle

  

Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**VNTRS is growing!**


We are now looking for a Senior Data Engineer who is passionate about innovation & data. Do you want to be part of a team that uses the latest technologies and grows our business in both Sweden and internationally? Do you have great engineering and analytics skills and would like to work with inspiring people? Then for sure you will enjoy working with us at VNTRS!

**About VNTRS:**


Creating successful companies together with our clients is at the heart and soul of VNTRS. We believe that too many great ideas fall short due to the wrong reasons – we exist to change that. We are consultants but we don’t consider ourselves as such. We think that we get the best chances to reach success by becoming partners with our clients and working together as one team.


We are currently 30+ coworkers and at VNTRS we like to share risks and have skin in the game. To partner up with promising entrepreneurs/corporations and share the risk and upside together with all our co-workers is one of the cornerstones of VNTRS.

**About the job:**


Working at VNTRS as a Senior Data Engineer you can expect a lot of diversity in your daily tasks (engineering, advising clients, strategic solutions...). You will mostly be working closely with external clients, with some work including startups from our portfolio.


We will actively let you work on exciting projects to broaden your skillset. Within the assignments, you will be using a wide range of data engineering technologies, while also being a core part of cross-functional teams.


Depending on the assignment, your opinion will have a big impact when it comes to the solution, but also the scoping of the whole process such as prioritisation, techstacks and architecture.

**Must-have requirements:**


At least **5** years of experience working as a data engineer / BI engineer


Data warehousing - Ex: Microsoft Azure Synapse, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, Snowflake,


Data modeling & architecture


ETL (Extract, Transform & Load)


Programming & Scripting - Ex: Python, SQL, Scala, Java, C#


API & Data Integration


Cloud - Preferably Azure (Data Factory, Synapse Analytics)


Fluent in English & Swedish


Pragmatic, Self-acting and a people person

 **Nice-to-have requirements:**


Business Intelligence & Data Visualization Tools - Ex: Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Qlik Sense


Big Data Processing - Ex: Apache Spark, Databricks, Hadoop, Google Dataflow


Data Governance & Quality - Data Cataloging, GDPR Compliance, Data Lineage Tools (Collibra, Alation)


Previous consulting experience


Bachelors or master’s degree

 ***Additional information:***

 *Amazing equity & bonus programme:*


All co-workers get the exclusive right to invest in the portfolio of startups that we all work with.

*Coaching mindset and mandate to make change:*


We believe in a flat organisation where everybody is shaping VNTRS. You will get real responsibility from day one. Together we create a personal development plan based on your career goals and give you the senior support you need to achieve them.

*Having fun and work-life balance!*


At VNTRS we really believe in having fun at work and encourage a healthy work-life balance with a flexible hybrid way of working. Every other Friday we all gather for a social lunch and every other Wednesday breakfast is served - both of which are on the house. At the end of the week we also have a common after-work at the office. We also have two yearly conferences!

*Generous benefits:*


On top of our amazing equity programme, 5000 kr in wellness grant, educational bonus and parental leave top up during 6 months are some of our hidden perks.

*Application:*


If you're ready to play a key role in VNTRS's tech revolution, we want to hear from you. Apply now to contribute to the future success of VNTRS and our clients.

title: IT Ops Analyst
description:
**Title:** 
 IT Operations Analyst
   

  

**Reports to:** 
 Head of IT Service Delivery EMEA APAC
   

  

**Work Arrangement:** 
 On-Site
   

  

**Company Overview**
 Metrea is a defense company dedicated to translating commercial innovation into solutions for the hardest problems in national security. With deep mission expertise, Metrea focuses on delivering effects-as-a-service across Aerospace, Electromagnetic & Cyber, Digital & Synthetic domains via its capability groups. Metrea also consists of six support groups (Operations, People, Finance, Legal, Strategy and Solutions) that guide the development of specific capabilities that Metrea's files (product, projects, programs etc) leverage to achieve their targets.
   

  

**Group Overview**
**Metrea Management** 
 is our global shared service providing support for the Capabilities in areas such as People, Finance, Legal, Strategy and Information Technology.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 As an IT Operations Analyst, you will support the IT team in maintaining and administering Metrea’s IT infrastructure. This is an onsite role, providing hands-on support to colleagues across the business. You will handle day-to-day troubleshooting, user support, and assist with Office 365, Azure, and Intune administration.
   

  

 You will be expected to act proactively and professionally in addressing IT issues, ensuring colleagues feel supported and confident in using technology.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
* Onsite User Support
* Provide 1st and 2nd line IT support directly to staff onsite (password resets, account management, software installs, hardware setup, AV/meeting room support).
* Deliver clear, friendly, and helpful guidance to users of varying technical ability in a professional manner.
* Proactively identify recurring issues or opportunities for improvement and raise them with senior administrators.
* Escalate complex issues as needed.
* Systems Administration Assistance
* Support Office 365 administration (Exchange Online, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive).
* Assist with Azure AD user and group management.
* Help maintain device compliance and configuration policies through Intune.
* Device & Infrastructure Management
* Prepare and configure company laptops, mobile devices, and peripherals.
* Monitor hardware functionality and report potential issues.
* Maintain accurate IT records, asset inventories, and documentation.
* Security & Compliance
* Follow endpoint security practices and assist with patch management.
* Ensure compliance with company IT policies and data protection standards.
* Projects & Continuous Improvement
* Contribute to IT infrastructure projects alongside senior colleagues.
* Research and recommend improvements to systems and workflows.
* Demonstrate a proactive and professional approach to supporting the business and improving IT services.


**Skills And Experience**
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills – able to build trust and work effectively with staff at all levels.
* Proactive and professional mindset, with the initiative to spot and resolve issues before they escalate.
* Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.
* Positive, solution-focused attitude when assisting colleagues.
* Reliable, organised, and accountable for tasks.
* Ability to work collaboratively within a team environment.


**Additional Eligibility Qualifications**
* Essential
+ Strong knowledge and proven experience delivering 1st and 2nd line IT support in a professional environment.
+ Demonstrable experience troubleshooting and resolving issues with Windows operating systems, user accounts, printers, and mobile devices.
+ Practical knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration, including Exchange Online, Teams, and SharePoint.
+ Familiarity with Active Directory / Azure Active Directory for user and group management.
+ Experience with device deployment and management tools (e.g., Intune, Autopilot, or similar).
+ Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to provide clear, professional support to non-technical users.
+ Reliable, proactive, and accountable, with excellent organisational and problem-solving skills.
+ Eligible and willing to undergo security vetting.

* Desirable
+ Hands-on experience with PowerShell or scripting for routine administrative tasks.
+ Familiarity with virtualization technologies (Hyper-V, VMware).
+ Experience supporting audio-visual (AV) systems and video conferencing platforms.
+ Awareness of ITIL practices or structured IT support frameworks.
+ Exposure to network fundamentals (switches, Wi-Fi, firewalls — awareness rather than deep expertise).
+ Formal IT certifications such as:
- CompTIA A+ or Network+
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
- ITIL Foundation
- Experience with ticketing/helpdesk systems

+ Swedish language proficiency


**Our Firmware**
 Metrea’s single core value, “rooted in humility,” is supported by four key attributes: entrepreneurial, systematic, discerning, and over-deliver. These attributes, combined, form our Teammate Firmware, our culture. We explore these attributes during the hiring process when we grow our teams and continually support the growth of our culture. We are a hyper-collaborative, dynamically hierarchical organization united by a passion for what we do, how we do it, who we do it with, and who we do it for.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Friskvård of 5K annually
* Parental leave
* 5% occupational pension (swe. tjänstepension)
* 30 days of leave
* Bonus Scheme
* Personal development opportunities


**Right to Work**
 The employee will have the legal right to work in Sweden and will be able to produce right to work documentation.
   

  

**Work Authorization / Security Clearance**
 Employee must be an EU citizen
   

  

**Equal Opportunities Statement**
 Metrea is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

**Position Type and Expected Hours of Work**
 This is a full-time non-exempt position with typical working hours of Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Hours and work shifts may change in accordance with department and business needs. Exempt Employees must have the ability to be on-call and available, as business needs require. Non-Exempt employees may be required to work over 40 hours per week with approval from the department manager.
   

  

**Work Location**
 Stockholm
   

  

**Work Environment**
 This job operates in an office setting
   

  

**Travel**
 Some Travel (domestic and international)

title: Onboarding Associate
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 Wolt is a Finnish technology company and we’re best known for our food delivery platform. On our mobile app or website, customers can order their favorite meals or other goods from our restaurant or retail partners and either pick their order up or have it delivered by our courier partners.
   

  

 We’re expanding rapidly, from our office in Stockholm, and now we’re looking for someone to be part of this hectic, fun, and rapid expansion and help to set up our new partners for success.
   

  

 As such, we need a customer-focused and structured Onboarding Associate to support the onboarding and training of new restaurant partners and ensure the best possible partnership. As an Onboarding Associate, you will act as a key communicator between our operations team and merchant partners in order to ensure optimal success.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
**End-to-End Onboarding**
* Successfully onboard venues onto the Wolt platform by coordinating, executing, and monitoring the full onboarding process for restaurant and retail Merchant Partners.
* Ensure a smooth and speedy integration from when the contract is signed through to go-live.
* Proactively remove bottlenecks and roadblocks to maintain onboarding velocity.


**Merchant Relationships & Training**
* Build strong relationships with merchant partners, supporting them throughout onboarding and beyond.
* Provide training and education on the Wolt Merchant App and Merchant Portal (including live training if needed) to optimize partner performance.
* Keep merchants updated on system improvements and new features to ensure their continued success.


**Comprehensive Setup & Quality Standards**
* Create and maintain merchant venue pages, including offers, product photo coverage, translations, and menu updates.
* Ensure all content reflects Wolt’s brand standards, both in pragmatic and aesthetic terms.
* Guarantee that all partners experience the highest Wolt-grade service standards by monitoring progress and addressing needs promptly.


**Collaboration & Support**
* Support Merchant Services and Key Account Managers with tasks related to partner management.
* Contribute to long-term operational success by ensuring partners are fully equipped and aligned with Wolt’s service excellence.


**Qualifications**
* Logical problem-solving skills with a bias for action and impact
* Proactive ownership mentality - an independent thinker who can work with limited guidance, but through grit and determination can deliver a successful outcome
* Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to adapt the tone to suit the audience - you will be working with a lot of different people both internal and external
* Experience in sales, account management, or customer support is an advantage
* Fluent in Swedish and English to be able to communicate with the partners and ensure we have correct information on the app.


**At Wolt, We’re About Getting Things Done.**
 If this sounds like an opportunity you want to pursue, apply today! 💙
   

  

 Please note that
 **we do not accept applications coming through email due to GDPR** 
 . Make sure to apply through our careers page!
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Technology Management Consultant
description:
The key word is change. In a world where technology and business are merging, we are seeking a Technology Management Consultant to plan, lead, and execute IT projects and transformation initiatives, taking ownership of delivery from scoping through to implementation across business applications and technical platforms.
   

  

**Who is Umain?**
 We were founded with a
 **heritage in digital product development and engineering** 
 . This background gives us a unique perspective, ensuring that our strategic advice is always grounded in
 **technical feasibility and execution excellence** 
 . We are now expanding our focus to help clients at the C-level, linking core technology strategy directly to business outcomes.
   

  

 Umain is proudly part of
 **Eidra** 
 , a consultancy collective driven by the conviction that business transformation requires a combination of management consulting and best-in-breed expertise in creativity, engineering, and data. This partnership means that while you focus on strategic IT-Management and enterprise architecture, you have full access to orchestrate common capabilities from the best specialized companies within the collective.
   

  

 Our team consists of individuals with experience from the largest consulting firms, but with the flexibility, speed, and entrepreneurial drive that characterize a modern, flat organization. At Umain, we highly value
 **collaboration** 
 and
 **entrepreneurial spirit** 
 . Here, you are not only expected to lead demanding client assignments; you are also expected to actively contribute to our internal development, whether it involves shaping new service offerings in AI/Data or mentoring our junior talent. We reward those who take ownership and drive us forward.
   

  

**The Role: What will you do?**
 As a Technology Management Consultant Within Tech Advisory & IT Management, You Work At The Intersection Of Business And Technology, Helping Clients Structure And Execute Their IT Initiatives. Your Assignments Will Involve
   

  

* IT Strategy & Enterprise Architecture: Supporting clients in technology direction, investment priorities, and portfolio decisions. Helping translate business goals into future-state architecture for business-critical applications.
* Governance, Operating Model & Sourcing: Helping clients design the structures that make technology delivery work, from IT governance frameworks and risk management to operating model design, vendor strategy, and FinOps.
* Project & Program Management: Leading and coordinating IT projects and workstreams, managing teams, tracking delivery, and ensuring strategic intent translates into execution reality.
* Internal Contribution: Actively contributing to Eidra's business development, mentoring junior colleagues, and developing our competency pool.


**Who are you?**
**We Are Looking For Someone Who**
* Has 3+ years of relevant experience, preferably within a consultancy setting, across IT project management or technology transformation, in roles such as IT Consultant, Project Manager, Business Analyst, or Solution Architect.
* Is driven by a passion for translating technology strategy into measurable business outcomes.
* Has experience leading and coordinating IT initiatives and cross-functional project teams.
* Is a collaborative team player who creates structure, clarity, and momentum in delivery.
* Communicates complex technical concepts clearly to both technical teams and business stakeholders.


**Required Competencies**
* IT Domain Knowledge: Working knowledge across at least two of Eidra's five IT management domains: IT Strategy & Portfolio, Enterprise Architecture & Data, Operating Model & Workforce, Governance Risk & Trust, or Sourcing & FinOps.
* System & Architecture Experience: Hands-on experience with enterprise platforms and business-critical systems (e.g. ERP, CRM, modern data stacks, proprietary solutions), combined with a foundational understanding of integration patterns and cloud architecture.
* Strategic AI: A solid understanding of how to utilize and integrate AI tools and technologies in core business processes and systems.
* Collaborative Mindset: A collaborative and open approach, with a genuine commitment to continuous development, team building, and long-term client relationships.
* Analytical Drive: A critical-thinking mindset with the ability to identify bottlenecks and opportunities, and translate complexity into clear, actionable recommendations.
* Language: Fluency in English, both written and spoken, is essential.


***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our* 
 internal policies
 *. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Embeddedutvecklare
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* You have a Master of Science in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar
* You have experience of Embedded systems experience, preferably in vehicles
* You have experience of software development of embedded systems
* You have strong multitasking capability
* You are fluent in English, Swedish is a bonus.


**Application deadline:** 
 23-04-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Sales and Business Development Manager
description:
**Job Description**
 Sales and Business Development Manager
   

  

**Sales Business Development Manager**
 Sweden, Denmark, Finland or Norway
   

  

**This is Worldline**
 Worldline helps businesses of all shapes and sizes to accelerate their growth journey - quickly, simply, and securely. We are the innovators at the heart of the payments technology industry, shaping how the world pays and gets paid. Our technology powers the growth of millions of businesses across 5 continents. And just as we help our customers accelerate their business, we are committed to helping our people accelerate their careers. Together, we shape the evolution.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 Are you a sales and business development enthusiast with a keen eye for new opportunities? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you as a Sales and Business Development Manager
   

  

 for our Financial Services division in the Nordics & Baltics. This role is a critical driver of business growth in the region, involving the responsibility to both hunt for new business
   

  

 opportunities and manage existing clients to ensure their ongoing success. If you're an ambitious and driven professional with a strong track record in sales, industry knowledge of
   

  

 the global payments ecosystem, and a passion for fintech, then this is the perfect role for you to make a significant impact in the financial services industry. Join our team and help us shape the future of financial services in the region!
   

  

 You will be joining a highly skilled and friendly team with a passionate drive for success. Based in the Baltics, our team is dedicated to delivering exceptional results and fostering an environment of continuous growth and learning. As the Sales and Business Development Manager, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with this dynamic team and report
   

  

 directly to the Head of Sales and Business Development for the Nordics and Baltics.
   

  

 This position can be located anywhere in the Nordics, making it a fantastic opportunity for professionals seeking flexibility and the chance to contribute to the team's mission from
   

  

 various locations in the region.
   

  

**Day-to-Day Responsibilities**
* Research and prioritize new and existing customer needs within our segment
* Promote company products/services addressing or predicting clients’ needs
* Build long-term relationships with existing and potential customers to expand the network
* Negotiate and sign new customers, ensuring swift integration
* Drive thought leadership in payments and understand competitor products and strategies


**Who Are We Looking For**
 We look for big thinkers. People who can drive positive change, step up and show what’s next
   

  

 – people with passion, can-do attitude and a hunger to learn and grow. In practice this means:
   

  

* You are highly motivated, proactive individual with demonstrated ability to drive positive change and show initiative for future developments
* Are strategic and innovative thinker with strong problem-solving skills and a curious mindset to stay ahead in a rapidly evolving industry
* You master strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to build and nurture relationships effectively
* Are motivated and have passion for continuous learning, growth, and achieving exceptional results
* You have proven track record of sales and business development within the financial services or fintech industry (5-10 years)
* Have proven experience in negotiating and closing sales deals, with a focus on customer satisfaction and retention (5-10 years)
* Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team
* Are comfortable with high levels of autonomy and ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast paced environment


**Perks & Benefits**
 At Worldline, you’ll get the chance to be at the heart of the global payments technology industry and shape how the world pays and gets paid. On top of that, you will also:
   

  

* Health contribution
* Health check – Every 2:nd year
* Private Health Care Insurance (EuroAccident)
* Parental pay and 12 months pension during parental leave
* Opportunity to hybrid working according to company standard
* Benefit portal with many great offers, plus more.


**Shape the evolution**
 We are pushing towards the next frontiers of payments technology, and we look for big thinkers to join our journey. People with passion, can-do attitude and a hunger to learn and grow. Here you’ll work with ambitious colleagues from around the world, take on unique challenges as a team and make a real impact on the society. And with our empowering culture, strong technology and extensive training opportunities, we help you accelerate your career. Wherever you decide to go. Join our global team of over 18,000 innovators across 40+ countries and shape a tomorrow that is yours to own.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Worldline at jobs.worldline.com
   

  

 We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon
   

  

 race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical
   

  

 conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as an
   

  

 individual with a disability, or any applicable legally protected characteristics.

 We were founded with a

 . This background gives us a unique perspective, ensuring that our strategic advice is always grounded in

 Umain is proudly part of

 , a consultancy collective driven by the conviction that business transformation requires a combination of management consulting and best-in-breed expertise in creativity, engineering, and data. This partnership means that while you focus on strategic IT-Management and enterprise architecture, you have full access to orchestrate common capabilities from the best specialized companies within the collective.

title: Data Scientist, Subscriptions
description:
The Subscriptions Mission drives the growth and evolution of the Spotify business, ensuring we deliver compelling value to hundreds of millions of subscribers worldwide. We are focused on building the right set of offerings, plans, and value propositions that attract new subscribers and deepen engagement with existing ones.
   

  

 You'll join the Portfolio Data Science team, part of Subscriptions Product Insights. The Portfolio Focus Area is responsible for evolving and adapting Spotify's existing subscription plans to drive subscriber growth and engagement, as well as creating new revenue streams through add-ons and new value propositions. This work requires coordination across the entire Subscriptions Mission and multiple focus areas, with ownership and oversight from the Portfolio leadership team.
   

  

 As a Data Scientist on this team, you'll help the Portfolio team make informed decisions about how to grow and diversify Spotify's paid offerings. You'll analyze subscriber behavior, measure the impact of plan changes and new propositions, and surface insights that shape our strategy. Your work will directly influence how the Spotify experience evolves for users around the world.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Analyze subscriber behavior and engagement patterns to identify opportunities for plan evolution and new value propositions
* Design and analyze experiments to measure the impact of changes to subscription plans and add-on offerings
* Define and maintain success metrics for Portfolio initiatives, ensuring alignment across cross-functional partners
* Build and maintain dashboards and reporting to monitor the health and performance of subscription plans and new revenue streams
* Perform exploratory analyses that uncover growth levers and inform the Portfolio roadmap
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Design, User Research and other Data Science teams across the Subscriptions Mission
* Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior leadership
* Use AI-powered tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) to accelerate analysis and workflows


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 3+ years of experience in data science or analytics, ideally at a consumer tech or subscription-based company
* You hold a degree in Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience)
* You are proficient in SQL and Python and comfortable working with large-scale datasets
* You have experience designing and analyzing A/B tests, with a solid understanding of statistical methods
* You are a clear communicator who can translate complex analyses into actionable recommendations
* You are curious, proactive, and comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-moving business
* You enjoy collaborating across teams and are comfortable working in environments that require coordination across multiple stakeholders and workstreams


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London, Stockholm or New York.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Junior Print Designer, H&M Womanswear -  1 year temporary position
description:
**Job Description**

 Are you passionate about print and ready to make your mark in global fashion?
   

  

 Join our Print team at H&M Womanswear as a Junior Print Designer and be part of creating prints that inspire millions of customers worldwide. This is your chance to bring fresh energy, creativity and a global perspective to collections sold across all H&M markets and channels.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**What you'll do**




 You will work closely with our Print Designers in cross-functional setups, assisting in developing aspirational commercial fashion prints for a global audience. From repeat patterns to placement prints, you'll contribute to collections that define trends and connect with our customers. We want you to bring your ideas to the table – identifying the latest print trends and translating them into designs that resonate with our target customer.
   

  





 In this role both your creativity and organizational skills matters. You'll be involved in the full design process, assisting in the creation of both commercially viable prints and pushing boundaries with fresh, innovative concepts. Being a quick learner with strong communication skills and a flexible attitude is key, as you'll need to adapt and thrive in our fast-paced environment.
   

  

  

  





**Who you are**




 You have a genuine passion for print trends from both commercial and aspirational perspectives. High energy, independent drive and creativity come naturally to you, along with strong administrative skills to keep everything running smoothly.
   

  





 You're curious, open-minded and ready to learn from our global print team while developing your individual design skills.
   

  





  

  





 We belive you:
   

  




* Minimum BA qualification in Fashion Textile/Print or Graphic Design


* A minimum of 1-2 year’s industry experience as a Junior Fashion Print Designer


* Experience of creating all over repeat, placement prints, checks, stripes, florals, conversationals etc.


* Knowledge of different print techniques, general print technicalities and processes


* Excellent illustration and drawing skills


* Genuine and high-level fashion forward sense for global fashion trends and its print trends


* Strong eye for colors and garment-print connection


* Solid and fast skills in Adobe Creative Suite programs


* 3D CLO work experience is meriting


* Strong communication and organizational skills and flexible approach


* Fluent in English (Swedish is not necessary)


* Experience from Womanswear and/or Womanswear within underwear, nightwear or swimwear is meriting.


**Additional Information**

 This is a one-year temporary position with an amazing opportunity to grow and learn. You'll report to staff responsible for the print team and gain invaluable experience working on global collections.
   

  

  

  

**Does this sound like your next challenge?**
  

 Submit your application as soon as possible, CV in English and relevant fashion print /graphic portfolio work (pdf max 10mb/uploading) or link. Your portfolio should include vision/mood boards, full print design process and final print works/collections. Please ensure to include some work clearly relatable to the H&M Women’s customer. We would like see work that shows your creative aspirational side as well as your commercial fashion sense.
   

  

**Applications must include portfolio and meeting the above criteria to be considered.**




  

  





**WHO WE ARE**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  

  

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
  

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* 25% Staff discount on all our H&M Group brands, both in stores and online (H&M, COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories and ARKET).
* H&M Incentive Program – HIP. Learn more about the program here.
* In addition to our global benefits, our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits.



  

  

**JOIN US**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here. Please apply as soon as possible. Applications will be reviewed on ongoing bases.
   

  





 \*W
 *e are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application*

title: Data Engineer - Platform
description:
⚡️ What We Do
   

  

 Swiftly gaining ground as Sweden’s industry leader in battery storage and expanding rapidly in selected European markets, Flower is on a mission to enable the energy system of tomorrow.
   

  

 With an industry-leading AI-powered platform at its core, our service includes stabilizing the energy system by enhancing predictability and flexibility for both energy producers and consumers. By combining pioneering technology with a portfolio of flexible energy assets, we break new ground towards a fossil-free energy system, allowing clean energy to power society.
   

  

 🌟Who We Are
   

  

 Tech company at heart – purpose in our DNA. Flower consists of a diverse group of innovative individuals with a strong desire to improve the state of the world.
   

  

 At Flower, we believe trust, collaboration and diversity are essential to not only create an inclusive work environment, but also drive career growth. By embracing varying perspectives, we allow creativity and progress to flourish.
   

  

 To accelerate towards our goal of becoming the pioneering force powering the energy system of tomorrow, we are now looking for a passionate and skilled Data Engineer, Platform.
   

  

 👩‍💻
 **About The Role**
 As a Data Engineer on the Platform squad, you will take ownership of the infrastructure that powers our entire data ecosystem. This isn't just about moving data from A to B; it’s about building a scalable, self-service platform that enables our Data Scientists and Product teams to ship at pace. You will work in the intersection of software engineering and data, ensuring our systems are robust, observable, and high-performance.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain our core data platform (Data Lakehouse, orchestration, and observability) using Databricks, dbt, and Python.
* Implement CI/CD pipelines for data systems and leverage Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) to ensure reliable, reproducible deployments.
* Identify bottlenecks, optimize distributed compute (Spark) jobs, and assist with cost management to keep our platform lean and fast.
* Partner with product teams to design ingestion frameworks and declarative configurations that allow others to scale their own data needs.
* Ensure data quality, lineage, and security standards are embedded into every workflow, not treated as an afterthought.


**Who You Are**
* 2–3 years of professional experience in software engineering, preferably in data engineering with exposure to cloud-based data platforms (Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery or similar)
* Proficient in Python and SQL, with an understanding of distributed systems and a passion for writing clean, well-tested code.
* Hands-on experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) and modern orchestration (Airflow, Dagster, or similar).
* Meticulous in your work, with a keen eye for data quality, correctness, and edge-cases; you take pride in delivering bullet-proof solutions that scale.
* Great team player and communicator, ready to share knowledge, solicit feedback, and collaborate effectively within a diverse, agile team.


 📍
 **Location**
 Our beautiful office is located in the heart of Södermalm, just a short walk from Slussen subway station. We encourage in-office collaboration but support a hybrid work model.
   

  

 ✉️ Apply
   

  

 Our corporate language is English, as we have over 20 nationalities in the office. We therefore appreciate it if you could submit your CV in English.
   

  

 Throughout the recruitment process you will meet with the Talent Partner, Head of Platform, the Team and VP of Engineering.
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

*We kindly but firmly decline any engagement in recruitment assistance for our hiring processes. This includes partnership offers or the sale of recruitment tools.*

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Every company runs on contracts. They govern how deals get closed, how suppliers get managed, how partnerships get formed. But contract processes are slow, built for a world before AI, and they create bottlenecks for the people who actually execute them: sales, procurement, operations, every single day.
   

  

 Miramis is changing that. We build AI-native Contract Lifecycle Management software on the premise that contracts touch every team, so the tools should too. Our platform puts contract work in the hands of the people who execute it, without requiring them to be lawyers or wait for one. Legal sets the guardrails. Everyone else moves faster within them.
   

  

 We work with companies like Svea Solar and Treyd, and major financial institutions.
   

  

 Our AI agent, PLAI, runs throughout the contract lifecycle. It powers intelligent approval flows, extracts and structures data from entire contract archives, and turns what used to take weeks into minutes. It gives business teams the intelligence to act without bottlenecks.
   

  

 Contracts look like documents. They are actually structured data, relationships, obligations, and logic. Most tools treat them as flat text. We are building the infrastructure that does not.
   

  

 We're a small team of strong engineers who care about what they build. We're growing, and we're looking for someone who brings engineering depth alongside genuine curiosity about the product. Someone who wants to understand what they're building and why, not just how.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Design and ship LLM-powered features end-to-end, from prompt architecture to production monitoring
* Build and maintain agentic pipelines: orchestration, tool use, parallelisation, failure handling
* Define evaluation methodology: metrics, experiments, thresholds for shipping, and ensure high-quality AI implementation
* Identify product opportunities in the technical layer and scope them without waiting to be asked
* Make pragmatic decisions across model providers based on cost, latency, and capability tradeoffs
* Write code that your teammates depend on


 What We’re Looking For
   

  

* Hands-on experience shipping LLM-powered features to real users: prompt engineering, output parsing, evaluation, cost and latency tradeoffs
* Experience designing and operating agentic pipelines: orchestration, tool use, parallelisation, failure handling
* Strong backend fundamentals in Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and event-driven systems
* Ability to optimise LLM-powered features for cost and performance
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity: you scope your own work, run experiments, and know when something is good enough to ship
* Clear communication with non-technical stakeholders


 Our Tech Stack
   

  

* Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL
* Infrastructure: GraphQL, event-driven microservices, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS
* Frontend: React, TypeScript


 Why Join Us?
   

  

* Work on AI that is genuinely load-bearing, not a demo layer on top of a traditional product
* Own a meaningful slice of a hard problem from day one
* A small, senior team where your work has direct impact
* Opportunities for growth and leadership in a fast-scaling company


 If this sounds like your kind of problem, we'd like to hear from you.
   

  

 Miramis Technologies helps companies solve their everyday legal needs - empowering every team in the organisation to create contracts and manage legal with efficiency, ease and confidence. Miramis is transforming legal for businesses; turning it from a business blocker into a business enabler - with the end goal of giving every company in the world legal peace of mind.

title: Embedded Software Tester
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

 As an Embedded Software Tester, you will work on assignments with our market-leading partners, mainly but not exclusively within the Automotive Industry in Stockholm. You will be at the forefront of embedded testing, verification, and validation.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Reviewing software or functional requirements.
* Receiving and testing different software release candidates.
* Constructing and running different test cases (PyTest, Python, C/C++, or MATLAB Simulink).
* Performing embedded testing, verification, and validation in workbench or in HIL rigs.


**Your Profile**
* At least 4 years of proven experience in testing embedded domains.
* Experience with constructing test cases.
* Experience with hardware-related programming and debugging, including JTAG and other debugging tools.
* Experience in test framework development with PyTest.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Innovative Projects: Dive into exciting projects at the forefront of automotive development, shaping the future of mobility.
* Top-Notch Tools: Access the latest tools and technologies, empowering you to excel in your craft.
* Collaborative Environment: Work alongside a talented team of professionals, collaborating seamlessly to conquer challenges and achieve excellence.
* Continuous Growth: Fuel your passion for learning with ongoing training and development opportunities, staying ahead of the curve in the ever-evolving automotive landscape.


**Application and Contact**
 Selection and interviews are running continuously. Apply now since we assign roles during the whole application time span. Kindly note that due to GDPR, we will not accept applications via mail. Please use our career site.
   

  

 We kindly but firmly refrain from direct contact with staffing, brokerage, and recruitment companies as well as other external actors and sellers of additional job advertisements.
   

  

*Please note that identity and background checks may be conducted as part of the recruitment process.*
 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Operations Early Talent Leadership Development Program - Services Sales
description:
Eaton’s Operations Early Talent Leadership Development Program offers a unique opportunity to kick-start your international career. You'll receive leadership training, personal coaching, and network with senior leaders. Through rotational assignments across various locations and business areas, you will develop a broad skill set and prepare for future leadership roles. EMEAOMLDP2026
   

  

 Eaton, a global energy management leader with $27.4 billion in 2025, is dedicated to making energy safer, more efficient, and sustainable. With 92,000 employees serving customers in over 180 countries, we are committed to improving quality of life and protecting the environment.
   

  

 Ready to make a real impact and advance your career? Join us to tackle real-world challenges alongside Eaton leaders. Upload your most recent CV to begin the recruitment process, and be ready to start the program in
 **September 2026** 
 .
   

  

 This role will be primarily based in
 **Budapest, Hungary** 
 . Other possible locations include Germany, Austria, Finland, Italy, Poland, and Turkey.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Duration: Three years
* Rotations: Three unique twelve‑month assignments designed to build broad experience in operations management across manufacturing and supply chain functions.
* Potential Assignments: Lean/continuous improvement, quality, project management, manufacturing engineering, supply chain management, operations project management, logistics, or services operations—depending on country and business unit placement.
* Program Start: The program begins with a Service Sales Operations - Sales Support role at our Business Service Center in Budapest, a strategic location within EMEA. This role supports revenue growth and customer satisfaction within Service Sales Operations by managing sales leads and opportunities, supporting field sales, and strengthening relationships with customers and partners. It ensures effective and timely customer support through cross-functional collaboration and escalation management, while optimizing the installed base, enabling informed product and service selection, and driving continuous improvement in service sales processes across the assigned territory. Because this role supports the Nordic countries, knowledge of Finnish and/or Swedish is required
* International Exposure: After the first year, participants are expected to transition to one of our Nordic manufacturing sites, offering a unique opportunity to build robust operational experience that is essential for their long‑term leadership in operations management.
* The program begins in September 2026.


**Qualifications**
* Must currently possess or will have obtained a bachelor's degree (BS/BA) in Business Intelligence / IT / engineering by August 2026. A master's degree in these fields is also preferred.
* Work or internship experience is a plus (up to 3 years of experience)
* Language knowledge:Fluent English and good knowledge of Finnish or Swedish are must, Danish/Norwegian is advantage
* Effective communication
* Proactivity and curiosity
* Problem-solving
* Ability to learn fast and take challenging tasks
* Desire to build a leadership career in a multinational company
* Flexibility to relocate within the EMEA region during the program


**What We Offer You**
* Being part of a company that has been in business for more than 100 years, is well known in the industry, and has a major impact on the energy industry.
* Work in a company with commitment to Inclusion & Diversity and Sustainability.
* Comprehensive support throughout the relocation process, both during and after the program, tailored to your rotation.
* Exclusive learning curriculum designed to bolster your leadership skills. During the program, you will attend 20 training sessions focused on developing key skills, such as critical thinking, emotional intelligence, career management and self-presentation.
* Annual Early Talent Conference and other events to expand your network within Eaton by connecting with senior leaders and fellow participants on key topics – from sustainability and diversity to team management and business development.
* Strong, agile, and diverse team locally and globally.
* Hybrid worktime model for balancing your work and life.


 EMEAOMLDP2026
   

  

 We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law.

title: courier hourly stockholm arlanda
description:
We have an exciting opportunity for you to join our team of Couriers.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 FedEx is the largest express transportation company in the world, connecting more than 220 countries and territories. We work every moment to deliver the most important package of someone’s day. Our team of passionate people know their day-to-day work is invaluable in delivering outstanding experience to our customers. 530,000 team members strong, we are as diverse as the world we serve. We love what we do, and we do it well. Our reach is big, and so are our dreams. Join us and let's write our next chapter together.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Representing FedEx in front of our customers, courteously picking up and delivering their packages
* Driving vehicles in FedEx fleet on defined routes in various postcodes, making sure customers’ packages get to the right place, on time
* Making sure vehicles are always operated safely and legally
* Following all FedEx Health and Safety and other company policies and procedures


**What Do You Bring With You**
* Be a reliable team player
* Be energetic and enthusiastic
* Have a strong customer focus
* Have good communication skills
* Have an eye for detail to make sure paperwork is correct
* Holding a valid driving license for type of vehicle assigned is essential and held for 2+ years would be an advantage.
* Adaptability to external driving conditions and circumstances is required
* Commercial driving experience would be an advantage
* Basic geographical knowledge


**What Do We Offer**
* Attractive compensation package
* Training to get you started and on-the-job learning opportunities
* Extensive learning resources to further develop your skills and knowledge
* Tuition Assistance Program (\*applicable for FedEx positions with a permanent contract)
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family in difficult life situations
* Employee reduced-rate shipping
* Great career opportunities
* FedEx is one of the worlds most admired companies and trusted brands year after year


 Bring your ideas, individuality, and dreams to our global community. Feel good about where you work. Choose your career path - we’re ready to invest in your development. Join FedEx.
   

  

 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity employer and we are committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce in which we provide growth opportunities for all
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People-Service-Profit philosophy (P-S-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People-Service-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P-S-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

title: Senior IT-arkitekt till CGI
description:
Position Description
   

  

 Vill du arbeta i teknikens framkant och bidra till en mer hållbar framtid? CGI söker nu en senior IT-arkitekt som vill vara med och leverera lösningar till några av Sveriges mest samhällskritiska aktörer inom energi- och försörjningssektorn.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i uppdrag hos våra kunder inom elnät, fjärrvärme, elhandel, vatten och avlopp där digitaliseringen är central för en säker och effektiv energiförsörjning.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 I denna roll kommer du att verka som ledande IT-arkitekt i uppdrag och projekt hos CGI:s kunder inom energibranschen. Du blir en nyckelperson i att ta fram arkitekturlösningar som är hållbara, skalbara och anpassade efter kundens affärs- och verksamhetsmål. Du kommer att samarbeta med både kundens verksamhet och tekniska team i tätt samspel med CGI:s egna konsulter för att säkra en leverans i världsklass.
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig med erfarenhet som:
   

  

* Lösningsarkitekt
* Informationsarkitekt
* Infrastrukturarkitekt
* Integrationsarkitekt


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Minst 7 års erfarenhet som IT-arkitekt inom något av ovan nämnda områden
* Tidigare erfarenhet från den svenska energibranschen
* Förmåga att driva tekniska vägval och omvandla affärsbehov till lösningar
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga och trivs i konsultrollen
* Flytande svenska och mycket god engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är:
   

  

* Certifieringar inom TOGAF, ArchiMate, Azure, AWS eller liknande
* Förståelse för branschspecifika regelverk (t.ex. EI, GDPR, NIS2)
* Tidigare erfarenhet av leverans i konsultroll eller större transformationsprogram


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På CGI blir du delägare i företaget genom vårt aktieprogram, vilket speglar vår kultur av långsiktighet och engagemang. Du blir del av ett erfaret arkitektnätverk där du har möjlighet att utvecklas, utmanas och bidra till arkitekturens riktning både inom CGI och hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Du får:
   

  

* Leverera lösningar i teknikens framkant till ledande energibolag
* Vara del av ett av Sveriges mest erfarna IT-arkitektteam
* Flexibilitet i var och hur du arbetar
* Möjlighet till personlig utveckling och certifieringar


 Plats: Stockholm - hybridarbete möjligt i viss omfattning
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan i dag! Om du har frågor om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande ledare Jakob Elkert, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på jakob.elkert@cgi.com
   

  

 Välkommen till CGI där du får vara med och bygga framtidens hållbara samhälle!
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.
   

  

 Senior IT-arkitekt till CGI
   

  

**Job Description**
 Vill du arbeta i teknikens framkant och bidra till en mer hållbar framtid? CGI söker nu en senior IT-arkitekt som vill vara med och leverera lösningar till några av Sveriges mest samhällskritiska aktörer inom energi- och försörjningssektorn.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i uppdrag hos våra kunder inom elnät, fjärrvärme, elhandel, vatten och avlopp där digitaliseringen är central för en säker och effektiv energiförsörjning.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 I denna roll kommer du att verka som ledande IT-arkitekt i uppdrag och projekt hos CGI:s kunder inom energibranschen. Du blir en nyckelperson i att ta fram arkitekturlösningar som är hållbara, skalbara och anpassade efter kundens affärs- och verksamhetsmål. Du kommer att samarbeta med både kundens verksamhet och tekniska team i tätt samspel med CGI:s egna konsulter för att säkra en leverans i världsklass.
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig med erfarenhet som:
   

  

* Lösningsarkitekt
* Informationsarkitekt
* Infrastrukturarkitekt
* Integrationsarkitekt


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Minst 7 års erfarenhet som IT-arkitekt inom något av ovan nämnda områden
* Tidigare erfarenhet från den svenska energibranschen
* Förmåga att driva tekniska vägval och omvandla affärsbehov till lösningar
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga och trivs i konsultrollen
* Flytande svenska och mycket god engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är:
   

  

* Certifieringar inom TOGAF, ArchiMate, Azure, AWS eller liknande
* Förståelse för branschspecifika regelverk (t.ex. EI, GDPR, NIS2)
* Tidigare erfarenhet av leverans i konsultroll eller större transformationsprogram


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På CGI blir du delägare i företaget genom vårt aktieprogram, vilket speglar vår kultur av långsiktighet och engagemang. Du blir del av ett erfaret arkitektnätverk där du har möjlighet att utvecklas, utmanas och bidra till arkitekturens riktning både inom CGI och hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Du får:
   

  

* Leverera lösningar i teknikens framkant till ledande energibolag
* Vara del av ett av Sveriges mest erfarna IT-arkitektteam
* Flexibilitet i var och hur du arbetar
* Möjlighet till personlig utveckling och certifieringar


 Plats: Stockholm - hybridarbete möjligt i viss omfattning
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan i dag! Om du har frågor om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande ledare Jakob Elkert, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på jakob.elkert@cgi.com
   

  

 Välkommen till CGI där du får vara med och bygga framtidens hållbara samhälle!
   

  

**Ensemble, en tant que propriétaires, mettons notre savoir-faire à l’œuvre.**
 La vie chez CGI est ancrée dans l’actionnariat, le travail d’équipe, le respect et un sentiment d’appartenance. Chez nous, vous pourrez exploiter votre plein potentiel parce que…
   

  

 Nous vous invitons à devenir propriétaire dès le jour 1 alors que nous travaillons ensemble à faire de notre rêve une réalité. C’est pourquoi nous nous désignons comme associés de CGI, plutôt que comme employés. Nous tirons profit des retombées de notre succès collectif et contribuons activement à l’orientation et à la stratégie de notre entreprise.
   

  

 Votre travail crée de la valeur. Vous élaborerez des solutions novatrices et développerez des relations durables avec vos collègues et clients, tout en ayant accès à des capacités mondiales pour concrétiser vos idées, saisir de nouvelles opportunités, et bénéficier d’une expertise sectorielle et technologique de pointe.
   

  

 Vous ferez évoluer votre carrière en vous joignant à une entreprise bâtie pour croître et durer. Vous serez soutenus par des leaders qui ont votre santé et bien-être à cœur et qui vous permettront de saisir des occasions afin de parfaire vos compétences et élargir les horizons.
   

  

 Joignez-vous à nous, l’une des plus importantes entreprises de conseil en technologie de l’information (TI) et en management au monde.

title: License Owner / Operator, Stockholm
description:
**Turn Passion into Business. Bring Stranger Soccer to Stockholm.**
 What if you could take something you love—football—and turn it into a sustainable, growing business?
   

  

 At Stranger Soccer, that's exactly what we've made possible.
   

  

 We're expanding our unique football experience platform to new cities—and we're looking for a
 **local leader in Stockholm** 
 to take the reins. Someone who understands football culture, thrives on building something meaningful, and is ready to operate their
 **own venture** 
 with the support of a proven global brand.
   

  

 Imagine this:
   

  

* Players in your city scroll through dozens of weekly football games on an app.
* They book in seconds. They show up. They play.
* They are ensured of a consistent high quality game experience because you are making sure of it.
* You're behind it—operating a full football ecosystem for your community.


**How It Works:**
 Stranger Soccer has redefined how people play the world's most loved sport. Through our tech platform, we make casual football
 **as easy to access as a gym session** 
 . With thousands of users in Singapore and expanding, our model is built for scale—and we're ready to bring it to Stockholm.
   

  

**Who We're Looking For:**
* A football enthusiast with strong local insight
