title: Teamchef inom Cloud-utveckling till NIRA
description:
*Lockas du av att leda ingenjörsteam i en tekniskt avancerad och föränderlig miljö? NIRA stärker nu sin utvecklingsorganisation och söker två engagerade teamchefer som tillsammans kommer att ansvara för en central del av produktutvecklingen.*


Detta är en roll för dig som vill kombinera ledarskap med en nära koppling till det dagliga arbetet och bidra till att bygga starka, välfungerande team i en global och datadriven kontext.
  

  

NIRA är ett teknikdrivet bolag där innovation möter verklig nytta. Lösningarna bidrar till säkrare vägar och smartare infrastruktur genom avancerade datadrivna system. Organisationen erbjuder en samarbetsinriktad och öppen kultur med en hög nivå av teknisk kompetens och ett starkt fokus på kunskapsdelning. Här finns en arbetsmiljö där idéer och förbättringsförslag uppmuntras, kombinerat med flexibla arbetsförhållanden. Det finns även goda möjligheter att utvecklas över tid inom organisationen.

 **Om rollen**  

Du leder ca 15 kompetenta och drivna utvecklare inom mjukvaruutveckling och närliggande områden. Rollen kombinerar linjeansvar med operativt ledarskap. Arbetet sker nära teamets dagliga aktiviteter, där du stöttar planering, prioritering och kontinuerlig förbättring, samtidigt som du säkerställer en hållbar och effektiv struktur på lång sikt.


De två teamcheferna arbetar i nära samarbete och delar ansvaret för den övergripande leveransen och teamens utveckling. Detta ställer krav på hög samarbetsförmåga, flexibilitet och ett gemensamt ansvarstagande.

  

I rollen ingår bland annat att:

* Leda och utveckla individen genom ett närvarande och tillitsbaserat ledarskap
* Delta i teamets dagliga arbete, exempelvis stand-ups och nedbrytning och planering av arbetspaket
* Arbeta nära produktledning kring prioriteringar, planering och leverans
* Bidra till att utveckla arbetssätt, verktyg och processer
* Säkerställa en välfungerande teammiljö och långsiktig teamutveckling samt kompetensförsörjning
* Ta ansvar för budget och teamens övergripande resultat


Det finns stor frihet att påverka hur arbetet bedrivs, tillsammans med din chefskollega.

**Din profil**  

Rollen passar dig som har erfarenhet av ledande roller i tekniska miljöer och som är bekväm med att arbeta i gränslandet mellan människor och teknik.


Ett samarbetsinriktat och pragmatiskt ledarskap är viktigt, liksom förmågan att ta ansvar både för teamets prestation och för helheten i organisationen. Rollen kräver att du trivs i en dynamisk miljö där prioriteringar förändras och initiativförmåga värdesätts.


Relevant bakgrund inkluderar:

* Erfarenhet från ledande roller, exempelvis som teamlead, projektledare eller liknande
* Erfarenhet från mjukvaruutvecklingsprojekt
* Förståelse för moderna teknikmiljöer såsom cloud, strömmande data eller SaaS
* Förmåga att arbeta i en snabbrörlig och samarbetsdriven miljö


Erfarenhet av personalansvar är meriterande.

**Om NIRA Dynamics**
  

NIRA utvecklar avancerade mjukvarulösningar för fordonsindustrin med fokus på säkerhet, prestanda och datadrivna insikter. Mjukvaran används i över 100 miljoner fordon världen över och kunderna inkluderar flera av världens ledande biltillverkare.


Med över 130 medarbetare och global närvaro är NIRA en etablerad aktör inom sitt område.


Läs mer om hur det är att vara en del av NIRA: Life at NIRA Dynamics

  

Låter detta som din nästa utmaning?

**Sök redan idag!**


Urvalet sker löpande, vilket innebär att processen kan komma att avslutas innan sista ansökningsdag. Ansök därför gärna så snart som möjligt. Sista ansökningsdag är söndag den 17 maj.


För mer information om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen, kontakta:  

Sara Lidmer, sara@idax.se

 **Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Client Manager
description:
**About us**
------------


group.one is a leading European provider of online presence, cloud hosting, and digital marketing services. Over 2 million customers trust us with their online success. Our global team consists of 1 500+ employees operating from nearly 20 locations across 15 countries, with our headquarters in Sweden. Thanks to the support of our partners Cinven and Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan, we are steadily expanding the group's service portfolio and geographical footprint.


When you join group.one, you become a part of a global network that values collaboration, growth, and excellence. Join us in creating online success stories!

**We are committed to an inclusive and safe environment, free from discrimination and harassment.**

**We welcome talent in all its diversity. Your gender, background, age, beliefs, or personal story do not define your opportunities here - what matters to us is mutual respect, personal appreciation, and creating a workplace where motivation and collaboration thrive. We believe in supporting your personal and professional growth, recognising you as both an individual and a valued team member.**

**We want to continue to grow with you and why we look forward to getting to know you.**

**Client Management**


As part of the production of our digital marketing products, we are looking for a **Client Manager (f/m/d)** to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for supporting our clients in the field of online marketing.

**Your responsibilities:**

* You will contact our swedish and english speaking customers across the world (no sale) via welcome calls for our website and digital marketing products.
* You will discuss the clients’ requirements for their website, consult on structure, and ensure all expectations are clearly defined.
* After the website has been created by our web designers, you will coordinate final revision requests and ensure successful publication.
* You will handle domain and email account transfers on behalf of clients.
* With your positive and service-oriented approach, you will contribute daily to delivering an outstanding client experience.

**Your profile:**

* You have professional experience in client service and enjoy daily client interaction.
* Your affinity for digital products and processes allows you to quickly familiarize yourself with new systems.
* You have a basic understanding of website structure and design principles.
* Experience with CRM systems is a plus.
* You have excellent written and spoken **Swedish and English** language skills.
* Danish language skills in written and spoken form is a plus.

title: Lead Architect
description:
Vi söker Lead‑arkitekter som vill arbeta i en roll där teknik, affär, kommunikation och säkerhet möts. Här får du kombinera ditt tekniska djup med din förmåga att bygga relationer, skapa förtroende och driva dialoger som leder både kund och team framåt.


Hos oss arbetar du i en trygg, långsiktig miljö där samarbetet är lika viktigt som arkitekturen - och där du får utrymme att påverka både lösningar och riktning.

### **Är du den vi söker?**


Du är en person som känner dig hemma i gränslandet mellan:

* teknik och verksamhet
* strategi och genomförande
* relationer och arkitekturbeslut
* vision och praktisk leverans


Du trivs i uppdrag där du får:

* vara först in hos kund tillsammans med sälj
* vända en dialog eller intervju till ett affärsutvecklande samtal
* skapa målbild, roadmap och teknisk vision
* guida team och stakeholders mot smarta prioriteringar
* säkerställa att arkitekturen bidrar till verkligt affärsvärde
* bygga förtroendefulla relationer som håller över tid


Du behöver inte vara expert på allt - men du är trygg, kommunikativ och bra på att se helheten.

### **Vad du kan arbeta med hos oss**


Rollen varierar beroende på uppdrag, men kan inkludera:

#### **Affärsnära arkitektur**

* delta i tidiga kunddialoger och behovsanalyser
* identifiera möjligheter, risker och möjliga angreppssätt
* bidra till uppdragsskapande och tidiga tekniska rekommendationer

#### **Vision & målbild**

* skapa övergripande arkitekturprinciper
* sätta strukturer för team, domäner, integrationer och flöden
* ta fram roadmaps och beslutsunderlag som håller

#### **Teknisk ledning**

* agera tech lead eller delivery lead
* coacha team i moderna arbetssätt (DevSecOps, CI/CD, IaC, cloud)
* säkerställa kvalitetsnivå, säkerhet och hållbarhet

#### **Kommunikation & samarbete**

* skapa tydlighet i komplexa sammanhang
* bryta ner teknik så att alla förstår riktning och beslutsmotivering
* bygga starka relationer med utvecklare, ledning och verksamhet

#### **Framtidens arkitektur**

* följa utvecklingen inom cloud, säkerhet, integration och AI
* utforska agentic programming och hur AI påverkar vårt arbetssätt
* bidra med perspektiv på hur lösningar kan bli både smartare och tryggare

### **Vilka vi tror att du är**


Vi tror att du:

* trivs i dialoger där teknik möter affär
* är bra på att skapa trygghet, struktur och förtroende
* har lätt att samarbeta och kommunicera med olika roller
* gillar att ta ansvar och leda utan att dominera
* är inkluderande, prestigelös och uppskattar teamwork
* har en bakgrund inom utveckling eller arkitektur och rör dig obehindrat mellan kod och strategi
* är nyfiken på nya arbetssätt - gärna AI och automatisering i arkitektrollen


Hos oss behöver du inte passa in i en mall. Vi välkomnar olika erfarenheter och personligheter - det är så vi bygger starka team och bra arkitektur.

### **Trygga uppdrag där du får växa i rollen**


Som Lead Architect hos oss får du arbeta i uppdrag som är:

* **långsiktiga** - med tid att skapa bra förutsättningar
* **affärskritiska** - där dina insikter spelar en avgörande roll
* **moderna** - med cloud, säkerhet och digital transformation i fokus
* **stabila** - med erfarna kollegor och kunder som litar på oss


Vi matchar dig med uppdrag där din kompetens gör störst skillnad - både för dig och kunden.

### **Vi satsar på dig**


Hos oss får du:

* kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling inom både teknik och ledarskap
* interna forum för arkitektur, säkerhet, AI och best practices
* kollegor som gärna delar med sig, sparrar och inspirerar
* möjlighet att påverka hur vi jobbar, lär oss och utvecklas
* en kultur där vi är både **vassa och snälla**


Vi tror att de bästa lösningarna byggs när människor får vara trygga, nyfikna och engagerade.

### **Om oss**


Omegapoint är norra Europas ledande konsultbolag inom säker digital innovation. Vi är över 800 medarbetare i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Örebro, Västerås, Enköping, Uppsala och Umeå.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are seeking a Site Reliability Engineer to Visa Open Banking - delivering open banking solutions as a part of Visa.
   

  

 Perhaps the most dramatic outcome of the digital revolution is the amount of data that is now collected and analysed. Visa Open Banking handles billions of events, and this number is increasing at an exponential rate. We are passionate about enabling data-driven decisions for our clients and internal stakeholders. Our goal is to ensure data is collected, transformed, and presented securely with accuracy and reliability. Building the infrastructure and services to support this is hence a key part of what VOB engineers are doing.
   

  

 We are looking for a Site Reliability Engineer to join our Edge Infrastructure team. You will be part of the team responsible for maintaning and improving VOB system reliability, scalability and efficiency. Your primary focus will be on maintaining and improving out traffic management platform, creating a safe environment for teams to publish their services.
   

  

**What We Offer You**
 A position in the Edge team means working in an international environment where you will be involved in:
   

  

* Providing VOB engineers with tailored self-service tools and services that enable teams to deliver, operate and observe their services, with low friction.
* Focusing on automation and tooling to enable other engineering teams to focus on core business activities.
* Automate provisioning, monitoring, and scaling using scripting (Python, Go, Bash).
* Collaborating with stakeholders to ensure that the services and tools align with their evolving requirements and use cases.
* Being a best practice champion, influence and create new designs, architectures, standards and methods for large-scale systems.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Cloud Engineering Manager
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.
   

  

 We are hiring an
 **Engineering Manager** 
 ...
   

  

 This role is an opportunity for a technologist with a passion for Linux and Cloud technologies to build a career with Canonical and drive the success with those leveraging Ubuntu and open source products. If you have an affinity for open source development and a passion for technology, then you will enjoy working with some of the best people in the industry at Canonical.
   

  

 The BootStack team designs, builds, and operates modern distributed systems on private infrastructure for customers. From Kubernetes to OpenStack and everything in-between, you'll be working with the latest technology in a fast-paced engineering environment. As a Cloud Engineering Manager for the BootStack team, you will be responsible for managing the engineers that oversee day-to-day Managed Service of customer environments, including customer service management, managed services operations and consistent product improvement engineering. Collaboration with customers, product engineering, and operations is critical to success.
   

  

**Location:** 
 This is a globally remote role.
   

  

**The role entails**
* Manage a growing engineering team to optimise the quality and velocity of both development and operations
* Identify and measure team health indicators
* Implement disciplined engineering and operations processes
* Represent the BootStack team with respect to stakeholders, customers, and external teams
* Ensure proper team focus on priorities, milestones, and deliverables
* Work to meet service level agreements with customer deployments around the globe
* Deliver quality managed services in a consistent, timely manner


**What we are looking for in you**
* Bachelors (or equivalent) education in a technology field
* Proven track record of professional experience of either software delivery using Python, Go, C, C++, Java, or similar and/or managing operations teams
* Proven experience with OpenStack
* Demonstrated strong commitment to testing methodologies and maintainable code quality
* Experience with Linux system administration, Ubuntu/Debian a plus
* Strong communication and cooperation skills
* Experience with agile software development methodologies
* Experience working in and managing distributed teams
* Technical aptitude for understanding complex distributed systems
* Experience with cloud topologies and technologies
* Travel to team and company events and customer meetings, roughly 20% or less


**What we offer colleagues**
 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Team Member Assistance Program & Wellness Platform
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

**Canonical is an equal opportunity employer**
 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Endpoint Management Specialist till Sweco!
description:
Har du erfarenhet av enhetshantering i större miljöer och vill ta nästa steg i karriären? Är du tekniskt nyfiken, samarbetsorienterad och gillar att lösa problem? Då kan rollen som
 **Endpoint Management Specialist hos Sweco** 
 vara rätt för dig.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Endpoint Management Specialist blir du en del av
 **AD & Endpoint services** 
 teamet på åtta personer inom Infrastructure & Cloud. Du samarbetar tätt med flera andra team och har ett helhetsansvar för hanteringen av tusentals användarklienter – exempelvis datorer, mobila enheter och de system som stödjer dem.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att vara en viktig del i den pågående förflyttningen från en traditionell on-prem-miljö med SCCM till en modern, molnbaserad endpoint-plattform där Intune är navet. Arbetet omfattar både migrering av PC-klienter och mobila enheter. Parallellt med migreringsarbetet ansvarar du för att drifta och vidareutveckla endpoint-miljön, hantera nya behov och förfrågningar från verksamheten samt utvärdera och implementera nya funktioner och förbättringar.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har några års erfarenhet av liknande arbete och har jobbat med endpoint management i större Intune i molnet. Du behärskar svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Intune i större miljö
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Powershell för script och automation
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Windows
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av att managera mobila enheter
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Azure


**Vi Ser Det Som Meriterande Om Du Har**
* Erfarenhet av virtuella klientmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av Mac
* Erfarenhet av SCCM


 Som person är du tekniskt intresserad, nyfiken och motiverad att utvecklas. Du trivs med att arbeta i team, är lyhörd för andras behov och har ett lösningsorienterat mind set. Du tar gärna ansvar, driver arbetet framåt och kommunicerar tydligt med din omgivning.
   

  

**Ansökan**
*I denna rekrytering samarbetar Sweco* 

*med Wise.
   

  

 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail, utan du söker enkelt med ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil på* 
***wise.se***
*. Vi använder kompetensbaserad rekrytering som metod. Det gör vi i vår strävan efter en mer potentialbaserad matchning. Vi ser därför gärna sökanden med olika bakgrunder, åldrar och erfarenheter, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och gör oss bättre och smartare som organisation.
   

  

 Har du frågor om processen eller rollen? Kontakta då ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Jacob Elmeljung på* 
*jacob.elmeljung@wise.se* 
***.***
*Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*
**Om Sweco**
 Transforming society together, we’re planning and designing sustainable communities and cities of the future.
   

  

 Solving the great societal challenges of our time is more relevant, demanding and inspiring than ever before. At Sweco, we bring together experts with different perspectives and skills to develop solutions that address the challenges of urbanisation, harness the positive power of digitalisation and make societies more sustainable.
   

  

 We offer our clients a combination of global expertise and local presence, adapted to their business and reality. Our ambition is to be our clients’ most relevant partner, working together to help them solve their challenges, today and into the future.
   

  

 Sweco is committed to enabling all its colleagues to achieve a great balance between work and their other priorities, such as caring responsibilities, leisure activities, further learning or other interests. We offer flexible start and finish times, part time and hybrid working options so that you can flex your hours around your day to day needs.

title: Data Analyst
description:
At TUI, we’re on a mission to become the most digital, data-driven travel company in the world. Our Airline Data Science & Analytics team plays a key role in that journey—delivering innovative data solutions and accelerating digital maturity across our global airline operations.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Data Analyst who’s passionate about solving complex problems, uncovering insights, and driving business impact through data. If you’re a curious thinker, a strong collaborator, and thrive in a fast-paced, agile environment—this could be your next adventure.
   

  

**We are happy to consider this opportunity on a hybrid working model basis in line with local office attendance requirements** 
 . International travel should be expected so flexibility is required in this regard.
   

  

 The role will be published until 1st May 2026.
   

  

**About Our Offer**
* Personal benefits: Attractive remuneration, discretionary bonus schemes, generous travel benefits, extensive health & well-being support, and more.
* Flexible working: Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance with a dynamic working environment.
* A career to shape: Access the TUI Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions.
* Broaden your network: We champion intercultural collaboration and provide opportunities to work on global projects and teams
* Community: Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation.


**About The Job**
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define business problems and translate them into analytical solutions.
* Break down complex challenges, identify relevant data sources, and deliver high-quality data products and dashboards.
* Dive deep into cloud databases and data pipelines to extract, transform, and analyse data using SQL and Python.
* Present insights through compelling storytelling and data visualizations that drive decision-making.
* Support the development of predictive models and machine learning solutions.
* Automate recurring manual data tasks
* Contribute to agile delivery by writing user stories, acceptance criteria, and participating in sprint planning.


**About You**
* Strong analytical mindset and experience with large datasets and exploratory data analysis.
* Proficiency in SQL and Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn).
* Solid understanding of statistical concepts and data modelling.
* Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau).
* Familiarity with cloud data platforms and enterprise data warehouse structures.
* Ability to communicate complex findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Hands-on experience in tools like Alteryx, Power Query, or other low-code/no-code data automation platforms is a plus
* A good understanding of agile/lean software delivery methodology, tools and techniques and the software development lifecycle including knowledge of Scrum and Kanban
* A continuous learner who thrives in ambiguity and takes ownership of their work.


 From a workplace to a place to belong. At TUI we embrace diversity, equity, and inclusion, encouraging everyone to come as you are, because together, our potential is limitless.
   

  

 We are committed to supporting candidates with disabilities and impairments so if you require any support, please do let us know.
   

  

**Security Clearance Statement**
 At TUI, safety is our top priority. We conduct thorough background checks on all employees who join our Airline. Rest assured; we’ll guide you on the necessary information you need to provide at each stage.
   

  

 Please note that if you are applying for a role in the UK,
 **you must ensure you can provide a full 5 years referencing, plus a criminal record check for all countries you’ve resided in for more than 6 months in the past 5 years** 
 (some costs may apply).

title: Systemintegratör
description:
På ERTEK är inget projekt det andra likt. Vi arbetar både med nyproduktion och befintliga anläggningar, alltid med fokus på att minska energiförbrukning och miljöpåverkan för våra kunder.
   

  

 Vill du ha ett jobb med frihet under ansvar och gillar att ”skruva och programmera” i exempelvis KNX, DALI eller PLC? Hos oss får du möjlighet att utvecklas inom den senaste tekniken inom fastighetsautomation, energioptimering och smarta byggnader.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är bekant med de vanligaste standarderna, protokollen och hårdvaran inom fastighetsautomation – framför allt KNX, DALI och PLC. Är du dessutom van vid projektledning och att leda andra kan en projektledarroll vara perfekt för dig.
   

  

 Om du är initiativtagande, trivs med kundkontakter och vill bidra till smartare och mer energieffektiva fastigheter, är du varmt välkommen att söka till oss. Skicka ditt CV och personliga brev till rekrytering@ertek.se. Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Senior Data Engineer within Visa’s Open Banking AI & Data Platform domain, based in Stockholm, Sweden, you will play a key role in designing, building, and evolving our next‑generation data platform. You will work hands‑on with complex data systems that support a wide range of use cases, including data warehousing, real‑time and batch data processing, analytical event systems, advanced data modelling, and infrastructure management.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, and partners across engineering, compliance, and AI to deliver secure, compliant, and scalable data solutions that meet the needs of the Open Banking landscape. You will contribute to architectural design discussions, apply established patterns and standards, and help ensure that solutions meet performance, reliability, security, and regulatory requirements.
   

  

 As a senior individual contributor, you are expected to take ownership of complex technical problems, deliver high‑quality and maintainable solutions, and support less‑experienced engineers through technical guidance and knowledge sharing. You will actively contribute to improving engineering practices, platform capabilities, and operational excellence, while aligning your work with Visa’s broader technical strategy.
   

  

 The Senior Data Engineer contributes to the technical design and implementation of the Open Banking AI & Data Platform, working within established architectural frameworks and enterprise standards. The role supports architectural reviews, helps ensure solutions meet requirements for security, scalability, resilience, and operational readiness, and identifies opportunities to improve platform quality and reduce technical debt. Acting as an experienced engineer within the domain, the role partners closely with Engineering, Product, Risk, Legal, Compliance, and Operations to deliver well‑designed and auditable data solutions. The Senior Data Engineer provides technical input, supports best‑practice adoption, mentors engineers through code reviews and design discussions, and represents the team in cross‑functional initiatives when needed.
   

  

 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Strong experience in data engineering and data architecture, including data warehousing, ETL/ELT pipelines, and data lakes in enterprise environments. Solid understanding of building secure, compliant, and resilient data systems, with exposure to privacy and regulatory requirements such as GDPR and PSD2. Hands on experience with data processing frameworks and languages (e.g. Spark, Hadoop, SQL, Python/Scala/Java) and event driven or streaming platforms (e.g. Kafka, Kinesis). Good knowledge of data modelling, schema design, master data concepts, and metadata management. Practical experience working with cloud platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and Infrastructure as Code tools (e.g. Terraform, CloudFormation). Familiarity with AI/ML data pipelines and supporting machine learning workloads in production environments. Proven ability to work independently on complex technical tasks, contribute to design decisions, and deliver solutions end to end. Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non technical stakeholders. Relevant degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or a related field. Professional certifications are a plus.
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Senior konsult IT-drift/infrastruktur Försvarsverksamhet
description:
**Företagsbeskrivning**
 AFRY erbjuder tjänster inom teknik, design, digitalisering och rådgivning. Vi är dedikerade experter inom industri, energi och infrastruktur och skapar värde för kommande generationer. AFRY har nordiska rötter med global räckvidd. Våra gemensamma principer – Result driven, Client centric, Empowering och Accountable – vägleder oss i hur vi arbetar, utvecklas och lyckas tillsammans. Var med och accelerera övergången till ett hållbart samhälle.
   

  

**Jobbeskrivning**
**Nu storsatsar AFRY och startar ett nytt segment som heter Defense! Känner du ansvar för det svenska försvaret, vill vara del av denna satsning och bidra med din IT-kompetens? Hos oss kan du göra just det.**
 AFRY har bland annat fått tilldelning på ett flerårigt ramavtal med Försvarsmakten där vi kommer att leverera deras konsulttjänster inom IT. Det här är en jobbmöjlighet för dig som vill bidra till att stärka det svenska försvaret och samtidigt ha roligt på jobbet, samarbeta med andra, bidra med din kompetens, ha schyssta ledare och vara del av ett riktigt härligt team.
   

  

**Vi söker just ju en senior konsult inom IT-drift/infrastruktur** 
 som vill vara med och utveckla framtidens försvarssystem.
   

  

 Som IT-konsult inom försvarsverksamhet kommer du att arbeta med avancerade tekniska lösningar och vara en del av ett team som säkerställer att våra system är robusta, säkra och effektiva. Du kommer att ha möjlighet att arbeta med spännande projekt som har stor betydelse för Sveriges – för vår – försvarsförmåga.
   

  

**Som konsult ingår resor som en naturlig del i arbetet.**
**Kvalifikationer**
 Dina professionella färdigheter är förstås viktiga men vad du har att bidra med som person är minst lika viktigt. I den här rollen behöver du t.ex. trivas med att samarbeta i team och dela ut och ta emot feedback, tycka att det är intressant när omständigheter förändras, ha en vilja att bidra och hjälpa andra och du drar dig inte för att själv ta hjälp om du kör fast.
   

  

 Vi tror att du har god säkerhetsmedvetenhet och hög integritet och behärskar mycket god svenska i tal och skrift, då svenska krävs i kontakt med kollegor och kunder.
   

  

**Skallkrav** 
 – du har:
   

  

* Minst åtta (8) års arbetslivserfarenhet av Linux i drift i servermiljö.
* Minst två (2) års arbetserfarenhet av LAN/WAN avseende installation, konfiguration och drift av routrar och switchar.
* Svenskt medborgarskap. För kunden och uppdragen i fråga krävs svenskt medborgarskap och godkänd säkerhetsprövning innan anställning.


**Börkrav** 
 – du bör ha:
   

  

* Arbetserfarenhet av Microsoft Windows Server, version 2016 eller högre, erhållen i drift- och/eller förvaltnings- och/eller utvecklingsuppdrag.
* Arbetserfarenhet av virtualisering, erhållen i drift- och/eller förvaltnings- och/eller utvecklingsuppdrag.
* Arbetserfarenhet av IT-relaterat arbete i serverhallar och tillhörande teknikutrymmen.
* Arbetserfarenhet av installation, konfiguration och drift av brandväggar.
* Arbetserfarenhet av att arbeta med att ta fram och vidmakthålla teknisk dokumentation.
* Arbetserfarenhet från arbete i IT-utvecklingsprojekt.
* B-körkort.


**Ytterligare information**
**Välkommen med din ansökan, sista ansökningsdag är 2026-04-28.** 
 Urval görs löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

**KONTAKTPERSONER:**
 Jens Andersson, Director and Head of Defense Digital
   

  

 jens.andersson@afry.com
   

  

 Rebecka Gravås, Group Manager
   

  

 rebecka.gravas@afry.com
   

  

**REKRYTERINGSPROCESSEN:**
 Följande steg ingår i den här processen:
   

  

* Telefonavstämning
* Teknisk intervju
* Chefsintervju
* Referenstagning
* Erbjudande


 För samtliga rekryteringar på AFRY genomförs som grund alltid en ID-kontroll, referenstagning samt verifiering av utbildning.
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  

*På AFRY driver vi förändring i allt vi gör. Vi anser att förändring sker när modiga idéer möts, när vi samarbetar, skapar innovation och omfamnar kreativa lösningar, det är så vi skapar framtiden. Vi söker konstant kvalificerade kandidater som vill ansluta sig till våra inkluderande team runt om i världen. Bli en del av oss och påskynda den gröna omställningen*

title: Senior Projekt- eller Program Manager till Defence & Security
description:
**Företagsbeskrivning**
 PA Consulting är ett internationellt managementkonsultföretag med fokus på innovation och transformation. I Sverige har vi etablerat oss som ledande rådgivare i transformationsprogram. Våra kunder i Sverige finns främst inom totalförsvaret, energi-, transport- och offentlig sektor. Vår kompetens och erfarenhet sträcker sig från framtagande av strategi och design till genomförande av lösningar. Våra uppdrag handlar om att i nära samarbete med kund förverkliga nytänkande i en teknikdriven värld. PA Consulting sysselsätter 4000 anställda globalt och vi avser att växa markant i Sverige i närtid särskilt inom försvars- och säkerhetsområdet.
   

  

 Vi tror att mångfald skapar ett starkare företag och strävar efter att anställa människor med olika idéer, bakgrund och kompetenser. Denna mångfald stimulerar till en rik och kreativ miljö – där våra anställda utvecklas och där våra kunder får bestående resultat. Vi strävar efter att rekrytera, marknadsföra och belöna anställda enbart baserat på deras förmåga att bidra till PA’s mål – utan hänsyn till kön, etnicitet, funktionshinder, religion, nationalitet, sexuell läggning, ålder eller civilstånd.
   

  

**Jobbeskrivning**
 Vill du vara med och driva samhällskritiska projekt inom försvars- och säkerhetsområdet? Vi söker nu konsulter som vill arbeta i gränslandet mellan teknik, operativ utveckling och nationell säkerhet. Rollen innebär att leda avancerade projekt och program inom Defence & Security med uppdrag för såväl myndigheter som försvarsindustri.
   

  

 Som konsult driver du komplexa projekt i högt prioriterade miljöer. Du kommer att arbeta nära kunder inom försvarsmyndigheter och ledande aktörer inom försvarsindustrin.
   

  

 Du kommer ingå i vårt Defence & Security team, och kommer att spela en central roll i att utveckla och stärka våra kunders förmåga att levereraresultat.
   

  

 Dina ansvarsområden
   

  

  

* Leda och koordinera projekt och program av hög komplexitet, i regel med tekniskt eller säkerhetskritiskt innehåll.
* Driva förändringsledning i miljöer som genomgår transformation, digitalisering eller operativa förbättringar.
* Samverka med interna och externa intressenter, inklusive myndigheter och industriella partners.
* Bidra till affärsutveckling inom området Defence & Security.


**Kvalifikationer**
* Flerårig erfarenhet som managementkonsult och/eller arbete inom om försvar- eller säkerhetsområdet.
* Projektledning, programledning eller portföljstyrning (traditionellt eller agilt).
* Genomförande av komplexa tekniska projekt.
* Förändringsledning i större organisationer.
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


 Meritanande
   

  

  

* Certifieringar i PMP, PPS, IPMA, PRINCE2, SAFe eller andra agila certifieringar och ITIL eller motsvarande styrningsramverk.
* Genomförande av projekt inom försvars- och säkerhetsområdet (försvarsindustri inkluderat).
* Kurser eller utbildningar från Försvarshögskolan.


**Ytterligare information**
 Vi välkomnar internationella ansökningar, men vi kan tyvärr inte erbjuda sponsring för arbetstillstånd, så du behöver ha full rätt att bo och arbeta i Sverige.

title: Integration Subpractice Leader
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Our Cloud & Custom Applications teams focuses on developing tailored cloud solutions, integrating IT systems, and driving business transformation, delivering business-critical results with quality and speed, powered by Generative AI. Capgemini’s Integration & API capability helps clients connect their digital core; applications, data, partners, and platforms, securely and at scale. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world!
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are now looking for an Integration Subpractice Leader to join the leadership team of our Integration business line in Sweden. You will be essential in driving the growth of our Integration business and practice capacity. You will be the people manager for team managers across Stockholm, Göteborg, Helsingborg and Malmö. In your role you will collaborate with our Head of Integrations & APIs to, for example, co-shape our strategy. You will ensure progress in execution of practice growth in and alignment to market demands. As an expert in your field you will be a visible ambassador for our integration and API offerings, and a client-facing leader. You are strong in architecture and will lead and develop our delivery teams, while also contributing part-time in billable engagements.
   

  

**Lead & grow the Integration Subpractice in Sweden**
* Lead, coach and develop team managers across multiple locations; set direction, priorities, and execution cadence.
* Drive capability and talent planning: hiring, onboarding, upskilling/certifications, and building communities of practice.
* Establish a clear operating rhythm across sites (delivery governance, staffing strategy, quality gates, and performance follow-up).
* Collaborate with Head of Integrations and APIs in strategy setting and aligning development of the subpractice.
* Take a leading role in transforming Capgemini’s Integration & API capability for the AI Agentic era, where integrations are no longer only system-to-system, but agent-to-agent, agent-to-system, and event-driven by AI.


**Ambassador & market maker for Integration and APIs**
* Act as a visible spokesperson for Integration & API: promote the offering internally (cross-business collaboration) and externally (events, client briefings, thought leadership content).
* Work closely with Capgemini’s partner representatives to develop partnerships and co-selling motions; strengthen ecosystem collaboration.


**Build pipeline through proactive presales & bids**
* Collaborate closely with the Integration CoE in creating pipeline via proactive client engagement and structured presales.
* Contribute with the integration perspective into bids: solution shaping, estimations, staffing approach, delivery model, risk management and value proposition.


**Client-facing advisory and delivery leadership**
* Engage confidently with clients and senior stakeholders, present integration strategies, architectures, and roadmaps with executive presence.
* Lead billable deliveries part-time, guide delivery teams to outcomes with strong governance and predictable execution.
* Shape client services in line with Head of Integration and APIs’ visions such as integration assessment & strategy, integration foundation/reference architecture, and delivery-at-scale.


***In this role you will play a key role in:***
* Lead and grow the Integration Subpractice in Sweden, in close collaboration with the Head of Integrations & APIs, ensuring strategic alignment and coordinated development of the subpractice.
* Acting as an ambassador and market maker for Integration and API driven solutions.
* Driving pipeline growth through proactive pre-sales activities and bid work.
* Providing client facing advisory support and leading delivery engagements.


**Your profile**
* Proven leadership experience as a people manager, ideally including manager-of-managers responsibility (leading team managers).
* Track record of building high-performing teams through coaching, development planning, recruitment support, and stakeholder management across sites.
* Experience or strong interest in applying agentic AI concepts within modern integration landscapes. Understanding how Agentic AI enhances integration platforms by enabling autonomous orchestration, intelligent observability, and proactive issue resolution—shaping more adaptive, scalable, and resilient integration landscapes.
* Extensive hands-on experience in integration architecture & solution design across hybrid environments (cloud + SaaS + on-prem).
* Strong experience with hyperscalers: Azure, AWS and/or GCP (integration services, patterns, security, governance) and SaaS/iPaaS integration platforms such as Boomi, MuleSoft, Workato. Certifications in any of these are beneficial.
* Experience with open-source integration variants is highly valued.
* IBM integration platform knowledge is a plus.
* Ability to align and collaborate across business lines and internal ecosystems, strong stakeholder management.
* Excellent communication in English; Swedish is highly valuable for many local client engagements.
* Relevant degree or equivalent experience.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* You will get the opportunity to lead and shape our national integration subpractice.
* Work with leading clients and build a strong integration community with partners and hyperscalers.
* You will combine leadership with meaningful involvement in client engagements, ensuring you stay close to architecture, technology, and real-world value creation.
* Collaborate directly with leading hyperscalers and technology partners, co‑create solutions, and shape the next generation of integration capabilities.


**Application**
*We look forward to receiving your application and will review candidates on an ongoing basis. As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

**Make it real | www.capgemini.com**

title: Dataarkitekt
description:
Vill du använda din kompetens och ditt engagemang till att skapa digitala lösningar för skolväsendet samtidigt som du bidrar till Skolverkets digitala utveckling? Vi söker dig som är en erfaren och driven dataarkitekt med fokus på datalager och integration. Du blir en nyckelperson i framväxten av Skolverkets nya datafunktion. Var med och bidra till skolans framtid!
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 I rollen som dataarkitekt bidrar du både operativt och strategiskt till myndighetens digitala förflyttning inom datalager och tillhörande integrationsarkitektur. Du är också delaktig i att utforma de lösningar som Skolverket erbjuder skolväsendet, med fokus på data och integration.
   

  

 Du bidrar även till att ta fram relevanta arkitekturbeskrivningar och att aktivt stödja Skolverkets digitala utvecklingsarbete. Tillsammans med kollegorna inom datafunktionen säkerställer du kvalitet, konsistens och integritet i myndighetens centrala dataobjekt, och bidrar därigenom till en mer digitaliserad och automatiserad skolvärld.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i Skolverkets tvärfunktionella arkitekturfunktion, där du bidrar till att sätta ramarna för myndighetens digitala lösningar genom att utveckla referensarkitekturer, arbetssätt och gemensamma artefakter.
   

  

 \* \* \* \* \*
   

  

*”Som en del av vårt team får du inte bara möjlighet att använda din tekniska expertis, utan även att göra verklig skillnad för skolan. Vi ser fram emot att välkomna en ny kollega som delar vårt engagemang för att skapa nytta och förbättringar för våra användare.”*
* Serena Granlund, enhetschef


 \* \* \* \* \*
   

  

 Du tillhör Enheten för verksamhetsutveckling och arkitektur inom it-avdelningen. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med kollegorna inom enheten och avdelningen, liksom med andra delar i Skolverket och med externa kontakter.
   

  

 Du arbetar på vårt moderna och rymliga kontor i Solna Business Park. Du kan också ha möjlighet att arbeta upp till 50% på distans.
   

  

**Om dig**
 För att göra ett bra jobb och trivas hos oss behöver du stå för och leva upp till den statliga värdegrunden och till våra kärnvärden för medarbetarskap: förebild, tillit, ansvar, samarbete och utveckling. Läs mer på www.skolverket.se/jobb
   

  

**I det här jobbet ska du ha**
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom it eller annan utbildning i kombination med erfarenhet som Skolverket bedömer är relevant
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som dataarkitekt med fokus datalager och integration
* Mycket goda kunskaper om datamodellering med fokus på både datalager och generell systemdesign
* Mycket goda kunskaper om olika arkitekturmönster inom Data Warehouse och rapportering
* God erfarenhet av utveckling och orkestrering av datapipelines i Python
* Praktisk erfarenhet av att analysera verksamhetens behov av data för utveckling av rapporter
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift samt goda kunskaper i engelska.


**Det är meriterande att du har** 
 erfarenhet av containerbaserade lösningar, ex Docker eller Kubernetes, erfarenhet av att sätta upp målgruppsanpassade visualiseringar i Power BI eller motsvarande verktyg samt erfarenhet av arbete i offentlig sektor eller med stora, komplexa informationsmiljöer.
   

  

**Som person behöver du**
* ha en god problemlösande förmåga
* ha ett driv att nå resultat
* gilla att planera samt har förmågan att få med dig andra framåt
* vara bra på att bygga starka samarbeten


**Viktigt att veta**
 Sista ansökningsdag är den
 **19 april** 
 . Anställningen är tillsvidare och inleds med provanställning i sex månader.
   

  

 När du registrerar din ansökan får du svara på några frågor i stället för att bifoga ett personligt brev. Läs gärna igenom ansökningsformuläret och förbered dina svar innan du gör ansökan.
   

  

 På vår webbplats kan du läsa vad som händer när din ansökan kommer in.
   

  

 Skolverket arbetar för att alla barn och elever ska få en bra och likvärdig utbildning i en trygg miljö. Vi stödjer på olika sätt den svenska förskolan, skolan och komvux. Som medarbetare på Skolverket är du med och bidrar till att skapa goda förutsättningar för barns och elevers utveckling och lärande. Vårt uppdrag – skolans framtid.
   

  

 Lär känna oss bättre genom att besöka vår webbplats skolverket.se/jobb

title: Engineer with C++
description:
**Are you an engineer within CAE, simulations, or mechanical development – with strong C++ skills?**  

**Do you want to work close to real products, solving engineering problems using both simulations and code?**  

**Then this could be the right opportunity for you.**

### **The Role**


In this role, you will work at the intersection of **engineering and software**, developing and maintaining tools and applications used in product development within the automotive industry.


This is **not a pure software development role** – instead, your work will focus on supporting engineering processes such as simulations, calculations, and product development.


Your responsibilities will include:

* Developing and maintaining C++ applications used in **CAE and simulation environments**
* Working closely with engineers to support **mechanical development and analysis**
* Contributing to **simulation workflows, calculations, and engineering tools**
* Understanding and improving how software supports **real-world product development**

### **About You**


To succeed in this role, you should have:  

Mechanical Engineering, Engineering Physics, or similar  

Experience working with **CAE, simulations, or product development**  

Strong skills in **C++**, used in an engineering context  

Experience working in **Linux environments**  

Understanding of **engineering calculations, data, or physical systems**

#### **Important**


We are specifically looking for candidates who have:  

Experience from **CAE, simulations or mechanical development**  

Used C++ as a **tool in engineering work**

### **Bonus Skills**


While not required, experience in any of the following will be beneficial:  

Experience with simulation tools or frameworks  

Python or scripting for engineering workflows  

Database knowledge (SQL or similar)  

Experience from automotive product development

  

In the process we will also evaluate your drive and ability to communicate in a clear and simple way.

**About Explipro**


Explipro values helpfulness and simplicity in the workplace. We are looking for individuals who share our commitment to integrity, transparency, and caring for each other. By joining us, you will be part of a supportive team that values continuous learning and personal growth. We offer competitive salaries, flexible working conditions, and numerous benefits to support your professional journey.


If this opportunity aligns with your experience and aspirations, we encourage you to reach out to us without delay!

title: QA engineer
description:
About the Role


We are seeking a detail-oriented and collaborative QA Engineer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will design and execute testing strategies that ensure the quality, reliability, and performance of our web applications and APIs. You will partner closely with product managers, designers, frontend and backend engineers, and other QA team members to translate requirements into comprehensive test plans, automate recurring test cases, and advocate for quality throughout the development lifecycle. The ideal candidate combines strong testing fundamentals with practical automation skills, a focus on accessibility and performance, and a commitment to continuous improvement.


Responsibilities

* Develop and maintain test plans, test cases, and test data that cover functional, regression, integration, and end-to-end scenarios
* Design, implement, and maintain automated test suites for UI and API layers using appropriate frameworks and tools
* Execute manual and exploratory testing for new features, bug fixes, and edge cases when automation is not feasible
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to define acceptance criteria and ensure requirements are testable and well documented
* Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines to provide fast, reliable feedback on code changes
* Identify, document, and track defects; work with engineers to reproduce issues and verify fixes
* Measure and report quality metrics (test coverage, pass/fail rates, flakiness, cycle time) to inform prioritization and process improvements
* Advocate for and validate accessibility best practices (WCAG) and participate in audits to ensure inclusive product experiences
* Perform basic performance and reliability testing and collaborate with teams to address bottlenecks and regressions
* Document testing patterns, troubleshooting guides, and onboarding materials to support cross-functional teams
* Mentor other QA engineers and contribute to a culture of knowledge sharing and continuous improvement


Qualifications

* 3+ years of professional experience in software quality assurance, testing, or a closely related role
* Strong understanding of testing methodologies, test design techniques, and software development lifecycle
* Hands-on experience with automated testing tools and frameworks for web and API testing (e.g., Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, WebDriver, REST/GraphQL test clients)
* Familiarity with test runners, assertion libraries, and mocking/stubbing strategies
* Experience integrating tests into CI/CD systems and using automation to accelerate delivery while maintaining stability
* Proficiency with at least one scripting or programming language used for test automation (JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Java, or similar)
* Knowledge of debugging and troubleshooting techniques for web applications, services, and client-server interactions
* Practical experience with accessibility testing tools and an understanding of WCAG principles
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills; experience working in cross-functional, remote-friendly teams


Nice to Have

* Experience with component-level testing and testing frameworks used in modern frontend stacks
* Familiarity with observability tools, performance monitoring, and real-user monitoring (RUM)
* Experience with contract testing, chaos engineering, or reliability-focused testing approaches
* Background in test infrastructure, build pipelines, or authoring reusable testing libraries and utilities
* Contributions to testing or QA open-source projects, technical writing, or public talks about testing practices


What We Offer

* Competitive salary and equity opportunities
* Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits
* Flexible work hours and remote-friendly policies
* Professional development budget and learning opportunities
* Generous paid time off and parental leave


How to Apply


Please submit your resume and links to relevant repositories, automation examples, or testing-related projects. Include brief descriptions of your role on each project and any testing frameworks or infrastructure you helped build. We welcome applicants from diverse backgrounds and are committed to equitable and inclusive hiring practices.

title: Software Test Engineer
company: アイエーアール・システムズ株式会社
description:
Are you passionate about building reliable software and improving quality across the development lifecycle? We are looking for a Software Test Engineer to strengthen our engineering teams by driving modern testing practices, integration testing, and automation. Join us and play a key role in delivering high-performance, maintainable products.

**About the Role**


As a Software Test Engineer, your primary focus will be on test execution and test automation. You will design, implement, and evolve testing strategies that ensure product quality from early development to release. You will work closely with development teams to improve testability, identify risks early, and build confidence in every release through effective automation and integration testing.


You will act as a quality advocate across teams, supporting engineers with best practices, tools, and frameworks while helping shift testing efforts toward scalable, automated solutions.

**You will be responsible for:**

* Perform and contribute to release testing, verifying end‑to‑end functionality and validating that releases meet agreed‑upon quality criteria.
* Design, develop, and execute high‑quality test plans and test cases for both manual and automated testing, with strong emphasis on testing across components and services.
* Build, maintain, and continuously improve test automation frameworks and contribute to automated testing within CI/CD pipelines.
* Supporting development teams in adopting effective testing strategies, including unit and integration testing.
* Identifying risks, defects, and quality gaps early, and communicating them clearly to stakeholders.
* Collaborating in planning, design, and requirement discussions to ensure quality is built into solutions from the start.
* Improving test frameworks, documentation, and processes to enhance long-term efficiency and reliability.
* Supporting troubleshooting, debugging, and incident analysis across development and release cycles.

**Who we are looking for:**


You are a collaborative and quality-driven engineer who works closely with developers and stakeholders to improve outcomes, not just processes. You proactively communicate, share knowledge, and help teams adopt practical and effective testing approaches.


You take a holistic view of quality, focusing on integration, system behavior, and real-world usage rather than isolated test cases. You are pragmatic, continuously improving systems step by step instead of waiting for perfect solutions.

**To succeed in this role, we see that you have:**

* Experience in software testing with a strong focus on integration testing and automation.
* Hands-on experience with Python and/or Ruby for test automation.
* Familiarity with test frameworks such as Pytest, Squish, or similar tools.
* Experience working with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins) and development tools like GitLab, Jira, or Artifactory.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to identify risks and dependencies early.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with engineering teams and influence quality practices.
* Fluency in English, both spoken and written.


Nice to have:

* Experience testing C++ software and understanding of C++ code.
* Familiarity with embedded systems, compilers, or tool chains.
* Experience with build systems such as CMake.

**What we offer you**


IAR is a multi-cultural and global business in a fast-growing industry, an organization where every co-worker's individual role is very important in the big picture. We welcome new ideas and take pride in our achievements. We offer you the opportunity to work in a curious, knowledge-sharing environment with a strong team spirit, where we will support you to grow both professionally and as an individual. We are problem-solvers and take on new challenges with excitement and energy.

**Apply today!**


Interviews are being conducted continuously, so please apply today!

title: Test and Verification Engineer - Solutions
description:
**Step into the role**


As a Test and Verification Engineer in MilDef’s Solutions team, you'll focus on building, assembling, and testing rugged IT-systems across various projects. From component and system development to functional and non-functional testing, you’ll ensure high-quality, robust solutions for our customers. At Solutions, we build and deliver customized IT systems tailored to customer specifications. We turn their IT visions into reality by providing complete and robust infrastructure solutions.

**Key responsibilities**

* Troubleshoot and resolve system issues during integration and verification phases.
* Build, verify and validate systems.
* Perform cable manufacturing, installation, and routing.
* Work in a lab environment with various tests and configurations.
* Conduct environmental testing at system level.
* Create and maintain test specifications within the project scope.
* Actively enhance processes, routines, and tools.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to optimize system solutions and processes.

**What you bring**

* 2-5 years of experience in similar role including hands on testing.
* Experience with IT hardware and networks is advantageous.
* Strong social skills and a strong team player, essential for effective collaboration.
* Familiar with system development, integration, and verification, such as EMC testing.
* Commitment to delivering high-quality work with a strong business mindset.
* Proficiency in both Swedish and English is necessary for this role.

**Get to know us**


At MilDef, you'll be part of a company that values hands-on involvement, strong team spirit, and the development of defense technology. With us, you will have the opportunity to develop new skills, contribute to cross-functional projects, and make a real impact on our continued success. We encourage continuous learning and collaboration, and we offer excellent opportunities for career development. We are proud to actively promote health and work-life balance. We do this, among other things, by offering attractive employee benefits and wellness initiatives, such as wellness activities during working hours.


Would you like to know more about MilDef, our products, and our culture? MilDef.com


For further information, please contact Mattias Jacobsen, Manager Requirements & Test or Elin Hovbrandt, HR.

**Important information**


We conduct drug tests on all our future colleagues before employment.


Due to the nature of our operations, employment regardless of position may be subject to background and security related checks. For certain positions, additional requirements may apply, including security clearance, classification within a security category, or citizenship requirements.

***MilDef - WE ARMOR IT.***

*MilDef is a global systems integrator and full-spectrum provider specializing in rugged IT for military, government and critical infrastructure sectors. MilDef provides hardware, software, and services that shield and protect critical information streams and systems, when and where the stakes are the highest. MilDef’s products are sold to more than 200 customers through companies in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States and Australia, and through partner networks in more than 40 countries. MilDef was founded in 1997 and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.*

**We kindly decline contact from advertising and recruitment sales.**

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Every company runs on contracts. They govern how deals get closed, how suppliers get managed, how partnerships get formed. But contract processes are slow, built for a world before AI, and they create bottlenecks for the people who actually execute them: sales, procurement, operations, every single day.


Miramis is changing that. We build AI-native Contract Lifecycle Management software on the premise that contracts touch every team, so the tools should too. Our platform puts contract work in the hands of the people who execute it, without requiring them to be lawyers or wait for one. Legal sets the guardrails. Everyone else moves faster within them.


We work with companies like Svea Solar and Treyd, and major financial institutions.


Our AI agent, PLAI, runs throughout the contract lifecycle. It powers intelligent approval flows, extracts and structures data from entire contract archives, and turns what used to take weeks into minutes. It gives business teams the intelligence to act without bottlenecks.


Contracts look like documents. They are actually structured data, relationships, obligations, and logic. Most tools treat them as flat text. We are building the infrastructure that does not.


We're a small team of strong engineers who care about what they build. We're growing, and we're looking for someone who brings engineering depth alongside genuine curiosity about the product. Someone who wants to understand what they're building and why, not just how.

### **What you’ll do**

* Design and ship LLM-powered features end-to-end, from prompt architecture to production monitoring
* Build and maintain agentic pipelines: orchestration, tool use, parallelisation, failure handling
* Define evaluation methodology: metrics, experiments, thresholds for shipping, and ensure high-quality AI implementation
* Identify product opportunities in the technical layer and scope them without waiting to be asked
* Make pragmatic decisions across model providers based on cost, latency, and capability tradeoffs
* Write code that your teammates depend on

### **What We’re Looking For**

* Hands-on experience shipping LLM-powered features to real users: prompt engineering, output parsing, evaluation, cost and latency tradeoffs
* Experience designing and operating agentic pipelines: orchestration, tool use, parallelisation, failure handling
* Strong backend fundamentals in Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and event-driven systems
* Ability to optimise LLM-powered features for cost and performance
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity: you scope your own work, run experiments, and know when something is good enough to ship
* Clear communication with non-technical stakeholders

### **Our Tech Stack**

* Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL
* Infrastructure: GraphQL, event-driven microservices, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS
* Frontend: React, TypeScript

### **Why Join Us?**

* Work on AI that is genuinely load-bearing, not a demo layer on top of a traditional product
* Own a meaningful slice of a hard problem from day one
* A small, senior team where your work has direct impact
* Opportunities for growth and leadership in a fast-scaling company


If this sounds like your kind of problem, we'd like to hear from you.

title: Application Support Engineer - (PCB/Data Management) - f/m/d
description:
**About Us**
 Siemens EDA is a global technology leader in Electronic Design Automation software. Our software tools enable companies around the world to develop new and highly innovative electronic products faster and more cost-effectively. Our customers use our tools to push the boundaries of technology and physics in order to deliver better products in the increasingly complex world of chip, board and system design.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 The Siemens EDA Global Support team is seeking a dynamic, Support Application Engineer for the Xpedition Enterprise tools suite with emphasis on EDM Server and data management. Building on EDA experience and system administration skills, this individual will serve as a key member of an award-winning Electronic Design Automation technical support team committed to providing excellent technical support. They will work directly with internal and external customers to resolve tool issues, partner with account teams to educate users and grow product usage and create knowledge content for the web-based support portal.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Proactively assist customers with Xpedition EDM Server and related tools.
* Provide support via phone, electronically, or on-site to help customers meet project deadlines.
* Guide customers on implementing and maintaining Xpedition EDM Server and design flow tools.
* Collaborate with account teams to help struggling customers overcome challenges.
* Act as a liaison between customers and Electronic Board Systems engineering, providing feedback both ways.
* Participate regularly in customer meetings and conference calls (internal and external).
* Develop and communicate solutions for customer issues as part of the account team.
* Create knowledge base content (articles, white papers, videos) for web-based support.


**Requirements**
* System administration experience.
* Broad knowledge of basic networking technology (LDAP/Active Directory, SSL, Kerberos).
* Experience with performance monitoring and virtualization.
* Proficiency in low-level application troubleshooting.
* Familiarity with FlexLM Licensing.
* Scripting experience (Linux shell, Windows batch file, PowerShell, or similar).
* Experience with Oracle or PostgreSQL based data systems.
* Self-motivated, collaborative, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
* Experience with the administration of PCB design tools such as Xpedition Enterprise, Cadence Allegro, Altium or similar (desirable)
* Detailed knowledge of the ECAD Library development and design data management. Siemens Xpedition Enterprise EDM preferred (desirable)
* Familiarity with scripting languages such as Python and C# (desirable)


**Why us?**
 Working at Siemens Software means flexibility - Choosing between working at home and the office at other times is the norm here.
   

  

 We offer great benefits and rewards, as you'd expect from a world leader in industrial software. A collection of over 377,000 minds building the future, one day at a time in over 200 countries. We're dedicated to equality, and we welcome applications that reflect the diversity of the communities we work in. All employment decisions at Siemens are based on qualifications, merit, and business need.
   

  

**Bring your curiosity and creativity and help us shape tomorrow!**
**Siemens Software.**
**Transform the Everyday.**
